title: Executive Assistant to the Chairman
description:
Executive Assistant to the Chairman

Full-Time | Remote (PH-AU Daylight Overlap)



About Us  

We are Nolastray — an Australian family-style ecosystem of companies spanning support services, finance, automation, and media.  

Our values: Be Honest. Be Adaptive. Be Legendary.  

We believe excellence comes from calm focus, kind communication, and deep clarity in systems.



Why This Role Exists  

Our Chairman manages multiple ventures and global workflows.  

You will be the central integrator — connecting people, projects, and platforms.  

This role suits someone who loves structure, documentation, and helping complex ideas run smoothly.  



Your Core Work  

• Keep calendars, tasks, and follow-ups clear and on time.  

• Maintain dashboards and SOPs (Notion / Supabase / Google Workspace).  

• Prepare weekly summaries of meetings, deliverables, and metrics.  

• Help document automations, finance flows, and key decisions.  

• Write concise internal updates — turning chaos into clarity.  

• Support ongoing projects: licensing, IP documentation, and onboarding.  



Tools  

Notion, Supabase, Stripe, Deel, Relay, Google Workspace, Teams/Zoom, AI tools (ChatGPT, Gamma, Gemini).  



Hours & Term  

Full-time (40 hrs/week), daylight PH/AU overlap.  

Long-term: minimum 2–3 years (we prefer 3+).

title: CRM Specialist (GoHighLevel)
description:
Position: CRM Specialist (GoHighLevel)

Company: Bluestage Marketing Partners

Location: Remote

Type: Part--Time

Reports to: Director of Operations / CEO





About Bluestage



Bluestage stays true to its roots. Bluestage exists to challenge the status quo by creating digital experiences that feel as premium as the real world, leaving customers happier than when they started. Through our network, we spotlight talent, spark creativity, and give back through access, tickets, and moments worth remembering.



Bluestage helps businesses grow through digital infrastructure—websites, CRM systems, marketing automation, and lead generation. Our platform, BluestageAI, powers lead management, automation, and customer communication for clients across industries including sports, events, automotive, construction, and local service businesses.







Position Summary



Bluestage is seeking a CRM Specialist with experience in GoHighLevel to manage and optimize CRM systems for both internal projects and client accounts.



This role focuses on building automation workflows, managing lead pipelines, implementing marketing funnels, and improving client conversion systems. The CRM Specialist will ensure leads are captured, tracked, and nurtured through automated communication systems that help businesses convert more prospects into customers.



This is a systems-focused role where organization, automation thinking, and attention to detail are critical.



?



Key Responsibilities



CRM Management

 • Build and manage CRM pipelines inside GoHighLevel

 • Configure lead stages, opportunity tracking, and contact management

 • Ensure accurate tracking of leads, clients, and marketing sources



Marketing Automation

 • Build automated workflows for SMS,
, and AI voice follow-ups

 • Implement automated lead nurturing campaigns

 • Design trigger-based automation sequences to improve conversions



Funnels & Forms

 • Build landing pages and lead funnels inside GoHighLevel

 • Configure forms, surveys, calendars, and lead capture systems

 • Connect funnels with automation workflows and pipelines



Client Implementation

 • Onboard new client accounts into BluestageAI CRM

 • Configure account settings, integrations, and automation systems

 • Train clients on how to use the CRM platform effectively



Integrations & Tracking

 • Connect third-party tools and APIs when needed

 • Implement UTM tracking and campaign attribution

 • Ensure leads from websites, ads, and forms sync properly into the CRM



Optimization

 • Monitor pipeline performance and lead conversion rates

 • Identify automation improvements to increase efficiency

 • Troubleshoot CRM issues, broken automations, or workflow conflicts







Required Qualifications

 • Experience working with GoHighLevel CRM

 • Understanding of marketing automation systems

 • Experience building funnels, pipelines, and workflows

 • Strong organizational and systems-thinking skills

 • Ability to manage multiple CRM accounts simultaneously

 • Clear communication and ability to explain systems to non-technical clients







Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience working with marketing agencies

 • Familiarity with SMS/email marketing automation

 • Knowledge of lead generation systems and conversion funnels

 • Experience with Zapier, API integrations, or webhooks

 • Understanding of Google Analytics, UTM tracking, or campaign attribution

 • Basic understanding of SEO and digital marketing







What Success Looks Like (KPIs)

 • CRM systems deployed and functioning without errors

 • Lead automation workflows actively nurturing prospects

 • Improved lead-to-customer conversion rates for clients

 • Accurate tracking of lead sources and campaign performance

 • Clean CRM data with organized pipelines and communication logs







What You Get

 • Work inside a fast-growing marketing and technology company

 • Exposure to real client growth systems and automation infrastructure

 • Opportunity to work with BluestageAI CRM platform

 • Career growth into CRM Architect, Automation Manager, or Operations Lead

title: Marketing Coordinator
description:
Overview

As a Marketing & Sales Coordinator (English & Spanish-speaking), you will help drive the growth of a fast-moving marketing organization servicing event marketing, media, entertainment, and local businesses. You’ll coordinate campaigns, manage content, support CRM workflows, handle client communications, and ensure lead inquiries are organized and followed through with accuracy. You will also contribute to developing our internship program and strengthening internal workflows to keep the organization running smoothly. Working closely with leadership, you’ll help ensure every message reaches the right audience and every initiative reflects excellence. Your creativity, drive, and strategic mindset will fuel new business opportunities and expand our impact, making this role ideal for someone who wants to grow, take ownership, and thrive in a high-performance environment where ideas quickly become results.



Responsibilities



Coordinate and support marketing campaigns across digital channels, including social media scheduling,
/SMS broadcasts, website updates, and CRM-driven automation workflows.

Assist with lead generation by researching prospects, preparing outreach lists, sending follow-up messages, and supporting inbound lead qualification.

Maintain strong client communication by preparing reports, gathering content, updating project boards, and ensuring deliverables are completed on time.

Conduct product demonstrations and technical sales presentations to prospective clients, showcasing features and benefits tailored to their requirements.

Utilize CRM software like HighLevel to track leads, manage customer interactions, analyze sales data, and forecast future opportunities.

Coordinate territory management efforts by planning visits, establishing relationships with key decision-makers, and maintaining a strong presence in assigned regions.

Collaborate with Web Development Team to develop targeted promotional materials and campaigns that support sales objectives on web,
, sms and social media.

Negotiate contracts, pricing agreements, and terms of service to close deals effectively while ensuring customer satisfaction.

Monitor industry trends, competitor activities, and market conditions to refine sales strategies and identify growth areas.

Provide ongoing account management support by addressing customer inquiries promptly and ensuring long-term client retention.

Skills



Proven experience supporting B2B sales efforts, managing outreach, and contributing to consistent lead generation results.

Strong management skills with the ability to lead projects, coordinate teams, or oversee client portfolios effectively.

Expertise in business development, including lead generation, cold calling, direct sales, and upselling.

Familiarity with CRM software like Salesforce or similar platforms for managing customer relationships and analyzing sales performance.

Excellent negotiation skills combined with a customer-centric approach that fosters trust and loyalty.

Ability to deliver compelling product demos and technical presentations tailored to diverse audiences.

Strong analysis skills to interpret market data, sales metrics, and customer feedback for strategic decision-making.

Effective communication skills for building rapport with clients across various industries including retail sales environments or technology sectors.

Knowledge of marketing principles that support integrated campaigns aimed at increasing brand awareness and driving conversions.

Adaptability in managing multiple priorities within fast-paced settings while maintaining attention to detail. Join us as a Marketing and Sales Coordinator if you're ready to energize our growth trajectory through innovative strategies, proactive outreach, and exceptional client engagement!

title: Virtual Assistant – Admin, Calls & QuickBooks | UK Business Hours
description:
Virtual Assistant – Commercial Refrigeration Service Company (London, UK)

About the Company

Kept Cold Ltd is a London-based commercial refrigeration service and repair company working with some of the UK's largest facilities management and retail chains. We're a fast-moving, growing business and we need someone sharp and reliable to support our day-to-day operations remotely.

The Role

This is a full-time VA role supporting the business owner directly. You'll be the first point of contact for clients, managing calls,
s, job bookings, invoicing and bookkeeping. You need to be professional, proactive, honest and fully capable of working independently.

Your Responsibilities

Answering and handling inbound client calls professionally — you are the voice of the business

Managing and triaging the
 inbox daily

Logging jobs into Tradify (our job management software)

Communicating with clients to confirm job bookings and attendance

Creating and sending invoices

Updating our profit share tracking spreadsheet in Google Sheets

Syncing invoices and financial records in QuickBooks

Chasing outstanding payments

General admin as required

You Must Have

Excellent spoken and written English — you will be speaking directly with large UK companies and facilities managers on a daily basis

A professional, confident phone manner — this is essential, not optional

Strong attention to detail especially with numbers

Experience with job management or field service software

Google Sheets proficiency

Reliable internet connection, quality headset and dedicated working hours aligned to UK business hours (Monday to Friday, 9am–5pm GMT)

Honest, transparent communication — if you make a mistake, we need to know immediately

Highly Desirable

QuickBooks experience or formal accounting/bookkeeping training

Experience with Tradify or similar field service management software

Previous experience supporting a trades or field service business

You Will Be Tested Before Hiring

Shortlisted candidates will be given a practical task before any offer is made. This includes a live phone call assessment. This is non-negotiable.

Hours

Full time — Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm UK time.

Pay

Competitive, based on experience. Please state your expected rate when applying.

To Apply

Send your CV along with a short paragraph covering two things: your experience handling professional phone calls with business clients, and your experience with accounting software or bookkeeping. Applications without this will not be considered.

The live phone call assessment line is important — it filters out anyone whose spoken English isn't up to standard before you waste time interviewing them.

 & Instagram). You’ll help turn raw footage into scroll-stopping ads that drive real results.



Company:

- Edit short-form video ads (15–90s) using CapCut for Meta (Founder ads, UGC, testimonials, product demos, etc.)

- Create multiple variations of ads (hooks, formats, pacing, captions) to support testing and scaling

- Add captions, overlays, sound effects, and music aligned with brand tone and performance best practices

- Work closely with our marketing lead to iterate on creatives based on performance data

- Send a daily/weekly progress report with completed edits and upcoming work



To Qualify for the Position, You Will Need:



- At least 1 year experience editing short-form video content (preferably for ads or social media)

- Strong skills in CapCut (required)

- Understanding of what makes high-performing Meta ads (hooks, retention, pacing)

- Experience editing UGC-style content (creators, testimonials, mobile-shot footage)



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have):



- Experience working with performance-focused creative teams (particularly for Meta ads)

We’re Looking for Someone Who Is:



? A fast learner who can adapt to new creative styles quickly

? Comfortable working in a fast-paced, test-and-learn environment

After 6 months, you’ll qualify for:



? 3 vacation leaves and 3 sick leaves

Salary



$750 - $920 USD/month (depending on experience)



Perks & Benefits

, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

Work autonomously—taking scripts, clips, and hooks and turning them into attention-grabbing videos without heavy supervision.

Stay ahead of trends in video marketing, storytelling, and social media best practices for e-commerce brands.

Manage multiple projects while maintaining quality and meeting deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

Qualifications:



Proven experience as a Video Editor, preferably in e-commerce, social media marketing, or DTC brands.

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or similar editing software.

Strong understanding of social media ad formats, aspect ratios, and platform-specific video requirements.

Ability to edit fast-paced, attention-grabbing content optimized for conversions.

Exceptional storytelling skills—knowing how to keep viewers engaged from start to finish.

Experience with motion graphics, text animation, and sound design to enhance engagement.

Ability to work independently and take creative direction, producing high-quality content with minimal supervision.

Preferred Qualifications:



Experience editing videos for beauty, health, or lifestyle brands.

Knowledge of A/B testing for video ads and performance optimization strategies.

Familiarity with Amazon product video guidelines and best practices.

Basic skills in color grading, lighting correction, and sound mixing.

Skin Research Institute is a fast-growing e-commerce brand dedicated to creating high-quality beauty and wellness products. Our marketing team thrives on delivering compelling, high-performing video content that resonates with our audience and drives sales.



Learn more about us:

Let’s create standout content together!

title: Industrial/Product Designer for Consumer Products - Full Time, Remote
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a highly creative Industrial Designer based in the Philippines to help define and evolve the visual identity of our product portfolio across high-end hair tools and power/home improvement tools.

This role focuses on product form, brand expression, CMF, and user experience. You will translate brand strategy into iconic, emotionally compelling physical products that stand out in competitive global markets.

From premium hair dryers to precision power tools, you will shape a cohesive and recognizable design language that defines who we are — while working closely with our product development team to ensure your vision is thoughtfully executed.

?

Responsibilities

• Lead the form development and aesthetic direction of new products across multiple categories.

• Create a distinctive and consistent design language that strengthens brand recognition.

• Explore concepts through sketching, form studies, ergonomic refinement, and 3D development.

• Develop thoughtful CMF (Color, Material, Finish) strategies aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure designs consider real-world functionality, usability, and internal component integration.

• Collaborate closely with the product development team to align on feasibility, performance requirements, and manufacturing considerations while maintaining design integrity.

• Produce high-quality renderings and presentation visuals to communicate design intent.

• Conduct trend research and competitive analysis to inform forward-thinking design decisions.

• Contribute to a cohesive product ecosystem across SKUs and categories.



What We’re Looking For

• Strong portfolio demonstrating brand-led product design, form exploration, and CMF expertise.

• Experience designing consumer products (beauty, electronics, tools, home goods, lifestyle products, etc.).

• Exceptional understanding of proportion, ergonomics, surface development, and user interaction.

• Ability to balance aesthetics, functionality, and manufacturability.

• Strong sketching skills (digital or hand).

• Proficiency in 3D modeling and rendering tools such as Rhino, SolidWorks, Fusion 360, KeyShot, or similar.

• Clear communication skills and experience collaborating with cross-functional teams.



What you'll get

Competitive Salary – Earn in USD!

Health Coverage (HMO) – Enjoy peace of mind after one year!

Paid Time Off – Because work-life balance matters!



How to Apply

Please submit your portfolio showcasing concept sketches, form development, CMF exploration, and final product renderings.

We’re looking for designers who create products people recognize instantly — before they even see the logo.



To move forward, please answer the following questions:

*Job Preferences:

title: YouTube Gaming Video Editor (Long-Term | YouTube + Shorts)
description:
About the Brand



We are building a gaming content brand focused on high-retention videos, strong pacing, and engaging storytelling.



Our goal is to create content that stands out through clean editing, watchability, and consistent improvement over time — not low-effort clips.



We are looking for a long-term editor who wants to grow with the channel and help build a consistent content system from the ground up.



About the Role



We are looking for a reliable and skilled video editor who can turn raw gameplay footage into engaging long-form YouTube videos and short-form content for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels.



This is not just basic clip cutting. We want someone who understands pacing, knows when a 
nt is boring, and can make gameplay feel engaging.



This is a long-term opportunity with consistent work for the right person.



What You’ll Do



Long-Form Content (Primary)

 • Edit raw gameplay footage into engaging YouTube videos

 • Turn longer sessions into tighter, entertaining videos with clear flow

 • Cut downtime, repetitive 
nts, and anything that hurts pacing

 • Add subtitles for important 
nts

 • Add zooms, emphasis, sound effects, and clean transitions where appropriate

 • Help create videos that feel watchable from start to finish



Short-Form Content (Secondary / Bonus)

 • Create short clips for TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts

 • Add strong hooks, captions, and fast pacing

 • Pull out the best 
nts and edit them for retention



What We’re Looking For

 • You understand YouTube pacing and viewer retention

 • You know how to make content engaging, not just “edited”

 • You can identify what should stay and what should be cut

 • You can follow direction but also think creatively

 • You are reliable, consistent, and open to feedback

 • You want long-term work, not just a one-time job



Requirements

 • Must have your own computer or laptop capable of editing HD or 4K video smoothly

 • Must have stable and reliable internet

 • Must have experience using Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, or similar editing software

 • Must be able to communicate clearly and meet deadlines

 • Must be willing to learn and adapt to our editing style



Bonus Skills



These are not required, but they are a big plus:

 • Experience editing gaming content

 • Strong sense of pacing, humor, and 
 timing

 • Understanding of U.S. / English-speaking YouTube audiences

 • Thumbnail design

 • Motion graphics or simple animation skills

 • Understanding of short-form viral content



Pay Structure



We use a two-phase pay structure:



Phase 1: Trial / Training Period

 • $3–$6 per hour

 • Typical trial period is 1–2 weeks depending on performance

 • This allows time to learn our editing style and expectations



Phase 2: Ongoing Work

 • $8–$15 per video

 • Optional short-form content: $1–$3 per clip

 • Pay increases based on quality, consistency, and performance



Workload

 • 2–4 long-form videos per week

 • Optional short-form clips as needed



Growth Opportunity



We are building a content team and plan to expand with additional roles over time.



High-performing editors may have the opportunity to:

 • Take on more work

 • Help shape editing style and workflow

 • Move into higher-paying or lead roles as the channel grows



How to Apply



Please send the following:

 1. Your portfolio or sample edits, preferably gaming content

 2. What editing software you use

 3. Your computer or laptop specs

 4. Your favorite gaming YouTube channel

 5. A short message explaining why you are a good fit for this role



Important: Include the word Eternus in your application so we know you read the full post.

? You are available for a short video call (Zoom or Google Meet)



---



PROJECT SCOPE & PAY:



This is a fixed-scope project. I estimate 15–25 hours of work total.

Budget: $150–$300 USD depending on experience and scope.

There will be a small paid test task before we begin ($20–30).



If we work well together, I am looking for ongoing monthly support at an agreed hourly or retainer rate.



---



TO APPLY, PLEASE ANSWER THESE 3 QUESTIONS IN YOUR MESSAGE:



1. Describe one Kartra project you've completed — what did you build and for what type of client?

2. Have you set up a Circle.so community before? If yes, briefly describe it.

3. What is your process when you're unsure how to do something a client has asked for?



Applications that do not answer these 3 questions will not be reviewed. Thank you!

title: Webflow Developer (Full Stack)
description:
We are looking for a high-caliber Webflow Developer who lives at the intersection of design and data. We don't just build static sites; we build high-performance web applications. If you are an "A+ Player" who thrives on turning complex logic into seamless user experiences, we want to talk to you.



The Role

You will be responsible for developing, launching, and maintaining sophisticated web applications using the WWX Stack (Webflow, Wized, and Xano). This isn't just about dragging and dropping elements—it’s about building scalable backends, managing authentication flows, and ensuring every interaction is snappy and reliable.



What You’ll Be Doing

Webflow Development: Building pixel-perfect, responsive frontends with clean class structures (Client-First or similar naming conventions).

Wized Integration: Connecting the Webflow frontend to the backend, managing state, and handling complex UI logic.

Xano Backend Management: Architecting databases, creating efficient API endpoints, and managing business logic.

System Optimization: Ensuring fast load times, secure data handling, and cross-browser compatibility.

Delivery: Owning the project lifecycle from the first build to the final bug bash.



Who You Are (Required Skills)

Technical Mastery: Proven experience with Webflow, Wized (v2/v3), and Xano. You should be comfortable with REST APIs and JSON.

The "A+ Player" Mindset: You don't settle for "good enough." You double-check your work, optimize for performance, and care about the details.

Reliability is Your Brand: When you commit to a deadline, you meet it. We value clear communication and transparency above all else.

Trustworthy & Professional: You will be handling sensitive data and core business logic; high integrity is a non-negotiable requirement.

Problem Solver: You don't just flag issues; you come to the table with solutions.



Why Join Us?

Work on cutting-edge low-code/no-code stacks.

Clear project scopes and direct communication.

A culture that respects your expertise and autonomy.

Opportunity for long-term collaboration on exciting builds.



How to Apply

We are looking for the best, so we’ve skipped the cluttered inbox. Please complete our official application form here:

title: Female - Sales Virtual Assistant
description:
I run a home organizing business in the California, United States and plan to open several additional businesses in the future. I am hiring a Female Sales Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines whose main role is converting incoming leads into booked clients. 



Must have a confident personality. 





IMPORTANT – Video Required



To apply, you must include a short video of yourself talking about:



Your sales experience

Your communication skills

Other relevant experience 

Why you would be a good fit



You may send a video link or
 it with your application.

If there is no video, I will most likely not review your application.





---



Main Responsibility (Sales)



Your primary role is sales and lead conversion.



Tasks include:



Answer incoming calls from potential clients

Speak with leads and help convert them into booked clients

Reply to new leads through calls, text messages, and

Communicate professionally with potential clients

Provide strong customer service

Social media interaction

Marketing

Content creation





---



Other Responsibilities



Virtual assistant support

Lead management

Client communication

Scheduling support

Research





---



Occasional Personal Assistant Tasks



You may occasionally assist with:



Scheduling personal appointments

Calendar coordination

This helps me focus on growing the business.





---



Required Skills



Sales experience

Strong spoken and written English

Confident speaking with clients on the phone

Customer service experience

Virtual assistant experience

Organized and dependable



---



Bonus Skills (Helpful but Not Required)



Canva

CapCut

YouTube

Affiliate marketing

Familiarity with AI tools



---



Work Schedule



Ideal working hours:



8:30 AM – (4:30)6:30 PM Pacific Standard Time (U.S.)



Note:



Another tea
mber currently works 3:00 PM – 6:30 PM PST

If you are not available during that time, it may still be okay







---



Interview Availability



I am available to interview between:



2:30 PM – 6:00 PM Pacific Standard Time





---



Team Structure



You will work directly with me.



I currently have another tea
mber in the Philippines, who will likely act as your manager and help oversee tasks.





---



If you apply, include your video introduction so your application can be reviewed.

title: Performance & Creative Video Editor - Ecommerce Ads (Fitness equipment Brand)
description:
We are VULCAN Fitness, an Australian-owned and operated ecommerce business in the home and commercial gym equipment space. Our goal is simple - to help as many Australians as possible access high-quality fitness equipment at an affordable price and achieve their fitness goals.



We are looking for a Video Editor to join our team and help us turn raw footage into conversion-focused ads for Meta, Google/YouTube, and short-form content platforms. This is not just a role for someone who can make videos look good. We want someone who understands how to make content that helps sell products, stop the scroll, and scale winning creatives.



Rate: $1,000 USD per month



Important: You must be available during high-volume campaign periods, especially in the lead-up to EOFY and BFCM, when turnaround speed becomes critical.



What you’ll be editing

- Hero customer gym setup videos

- Founder-led content

- Athlete shoots with popular Australian sports figures who trust our brand

- Product demo videos ( How to use, what exercises you can do with 1 thing, comparisons)

- UGC raw content turned into reels and paid ads

- Before/after gym transformation content

- Paid ad creatives

- Sales ads across hype, live, and last chance campaign phases (EOFY, BFCM, NY sale periods)





What success looks like in this role:

- Turning raw footage into strong, conversion-focused ads quickly

- Helping us create more repeatable and scalable ad creatives

- Supporting fast content turnaround during launches and sale periods, while encouraging high-quality evergreen creatives outside of sales.

- Bringing ideas that help improve performance and purchases, not just aesthetics

- Helping us scale creative output across Meta and Google/YouTube



You should be confident editing

- Movement-driven yet educational content

- Ambient training clips and mic’d-up content

- UGC-style ads and short-form test creatives from raw footage

- Fast-turnaround ad variations based on performance data



You must understand

- The importance of hooks in the first 1-3 seconds + how customers engage with them

- Ad pacing and retention

- Cutdowns and versioning from one source file

- Subtitles and text overlays

- Platform formatting for Meta and YouTube (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)

- how to incorporate different CTAs and offers depending on campaign angle

- How to spot funny, intriguing, or on-trend 
nts that can become strong hooks



Deliverables we commonly need:

- Multiple hook variations from one shoot

- Different CTA and offer versions, cna reuse content with same/similar message, but different hook to draw customers in

- Raw footage organisation

- Creative input when you identify a stronger angle, while still following our branding



Example of what we may expect from one athlete shoot:

1 x cinematic brand piece for a collaborative Instagram post

1 x UGC-feel ad

1 x product-focused / exercise-driven video

2 x hook variants

1 x YouTube version



You are a strong fit if you

- Have experience editing ads for ecommerce brands

- Understand paid social creative, not just cinematic editing

- Can take one shoot and turn it into multiple usable assets

- Work quickly and communicate clearly

- Can follow a brief while still bringing your own ideas

- Understand that speed, iteration, and performance matter



Bonus if you have experience:

- editing for fitness, sport, or equipment brands

- with Meta ads or YouTube ad creatives

- working with UGC or founder-led content

- A good eye for direct-response editing



To apply, please send

- Your portfolio

- 3-5 examples of ads you’ve edited for ecommerce brands for Meta ads (if not found in portfolio)

- Your usual turnaround time for a 15-30 second ad

- What editing software you use



Important: Please include examples of ads made for ecommerce brands, not just cinematic edits. We don't need wedding-video ambience, we want authentic, educational, and goal-driven ads. 



To show you’ve read this properly, start your application with the words: VULCAN editor

title: Social Media & OPS Assistant to Owner / GM
description:
Hi,



We are looking for a hands-on Social Media & YouTube Operations Assistant to help run and improve an active live-streaming and content publishing system.



This is not a passive role. We are looking for someone who can jump in, take ownership of day-to-day operations, and help keep everything running smoothly while we improve the system.



The project (Griffinheart) produces live music, comedy, and talk content which is streamed and distributed across multiple platforms including YouTube,
/X,
, LinkedIn, and Twitch.  The Project also creates and Publishes:  Written Works. Articles, Books etc.



Current Daily Operations Include:

• Scheduling and managing livestreams via Restream

• Uploading and managing YouTube videos

• Publishing Shorts (high volume)

• Writing and updating video descriptions (including copyright and links)

• Ensuring Patreon and other monetization links are properly placed

• Organizing content, playlists, and general channel structure

• Monitoring streams and making sure everything runs correctly



What We Are Looking For:

• Someone who takes action quickly and does not wait to be told every step

• Strong attention to detail

• Comfortable working with YouTube Studio and social platforms

• Able to follow direction but also suggest improvements

• Good communication (clear and direct)

• Reliable and consistent



Important:

This role is “learn by doing.” You will be stepping into an active system and taking over operations while improving them as you go.



If you are someone who prefers detailed step-by-step instructions before starting, this is NOT the right role.



If you are someone who can jump in, figure things out, ask smart questions, and get things done — this may be a great fit.



Hours:

To start: 10–15 hours per week, with potential to increase.



Compensation:

Based on experience. Starting range typically $4–6/hour.



If interested, please reply with:



Your experience with YouTube or social media platforms



A brief example of something you have managed or improved



Confirmation that you are comfortable jumping into an active system and learning on the job



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Sincerely,

Joe Griffin, Griffinheart Studios Inc.

title: Dental Insurance Verifier
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Dental Insurance Verifier to join our growing team. This is a full-time remote position for someone experienced in verifying dental insurance benefits and communicating with insurance providers and dental offices.



The ideal candidate should be organized, proactive, and comfortable working with dental insurance portals, patient records, and verification processes.



Responsibilities:



Verify dental insurance eligibility and benefits for patients



Contact insurance companies via phone or online portals



Review coverage details including deductibles, maximums, waiting periods, and limitations



Document verification results accurately in the system



Coordinate with dental office staff regarding patient benefits



Ensure all patient insurance information is updated and accurate



Follow up on pending verifications when needed



Requirements:



Previous experience with dental insurance verification (preferred)



Familiarity with dental procedures and CDT codes is a plus



Strong attention to detail and organizational skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Experience with dental software or insurance portals is a plus



Work Schedule:



Full-Time (40 hours per week)



US business hours

title: As-Built CAD Drafter, Revit Modeler, & QC Reviewer
description:
Adaptive Property Solutions – a quickly growing entrepreneurial spirited company which utilizes innovation and technology to provide commercial clients single-source, end-to-end, full-service solutions for portfolio?wide site surveys across the United States and Canada – is seeking a CAD Drafter & Revit Reviewer.



APS’s CAD Drafting, BIM Modeling, and Quality Control teams work independently and collaboratively to ensure our customers receive consistency, accuracy, and timeliness on their projects regardless of location. This position will be focused on our As?Built?Survey product line, which provides critical building documentation for clients in the commercial and retail fields.



The main tasks of this position include generating existing conditions drawings in AutoCAD based on field?collected measurements and scan data; reviewing, updating, and developing Revit models of existing conditions; and performing Quality Control reviews to ensure APS deliverables are fully coordinated and produced to internal and client standards.



Essential credentials include:

• 2 to 10 years of experience in Architecture, Interior Design, Building Construction Management, or another related field. Civil and MEP Engineers need not apply.

• 2+ years office experience including drawing and developing CAD and Revit files from existing conditions documentation

• Knowledge of building systems, US standard commercial construction methods, and detailing

• Experience creating and reviewing as-built/existing conditions documentation

• Experience making changes based on drawing review notes and corrections (red-lines)

• Strong communications and organizational skills

• Personal organization and time management skills

• Project coordination skills

• Proficiency and project experience in using: 

o AutoCAD

o Revit

o Recap or other Point Cloud Management software

o Acrobat or Bluebeam Markup Tools or other digital drawing markup platforms

• Native speaker of Standard American English or Fluency in Standard American English is required.



Preferred, but not required credentials include:

• Professional Architecture degree

• Experience providing coherent review notes and feedback to others

• Project management experience and team coordination skills

• Matterport Tour and Point Cloud experience

• Experience with small interior design and prototype implementation projects



We are looking for an independent contractor to fill an initial need for a part-time equivalent hourly position. There is potential for this to transition into a permanent full-time equivalent hourly position eventually.

title: AI Music & Short-Form Video (Suno + CapCut + Midjourney)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We run a growing subliminal audio brand on TikTok (6K+ followers) and Spotify. We need someone to help produce tracks and edit short-form videos weekly. This is a creative role, not data entry. You need good taste and an ear for what sounds right.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Generate music tracks using Suno AI (we provide lyrics + style references)

- Generate short videos using Midjourney

- Edit 60-second videos in CapCut (syncing audio to video, timing the hook correctly)

- Submit batches for approval. Day 1: songs for review. Day 2: video edits on approved songs only.

- ~7 outputs per week



PAY



$7 USD per approved output (song + video package). 



Tools provided after hiring: Suno account and Midjourney account will be provided. You do not need to pay for any tools.



REQUIREMENTS



- Comfortable learning new AI tools (Suno, Midjourney)

- CapCut video editing experience (or similar)

- Good ear for music. You can tell the difference between a track that hits and one that's mid.

- Reliable internet and available for ongoing weekly work

- Responsive on



HOW THIS WORKS



Step 1 - Apply



Reply with the following (applications missing #1 or #2 will be ignored):



1. Put the word "VIXANA" at the top of your application.

2. Go to our TikTok 
 at least 5 videos. Tell me which ONE is the strongest and WHY in 2-3 sentences. Be specific.

3. If you have any experience with Suno AI, share examples or a portfolio of tracks you've created. This is a plus, not a requirement.



Step 2 - Paid Trial (top 5 applicants only)



You will receive a set of lyrics and style references. Generate a track using Suno and submit your best output. You will need your own free Suno account for the trial (free accounts get 50 credits/day, more than enough). Trial pays $5 USD regardless of outcome.



Step 3 - Hire



Best performer gets the ongoing role with full tool access provided.

title: URGENT: Hiring "AI Influencer" CapCut Video Creator *backup* ( Veo3, HeyGen, ChatGPT etc. )
description:
Please read the ENTIRE description before applying! :)



Our current candidate may NOT continue ( not confirmed yet ) due to his personal life problems so we're now ONLY looking for VERY dedicated members with experience in CapCut and other AI tools mentioned as a backup. This opportunity is seriously much better than it sounds at first glance!







A few words about us:



Hey! We are Organic Media, a micro-agency creating and distributing educational and engaging AI-generated short-form videos for e-commerce brands, mainly in the pet niche.



You’ll work directly with our amazing manager ( 20 years old from Europe, with over 3 years of real experience in this exact space ), who has personally prepared step-by-step tutorials on Loom to teach you everything from the ground up.

No confusion. No guessing. No wasted time. ( Most tea
mbers learned the workflow within a few days and are now working fully independently )







What kind of videos will you create?

Simple UGC-like short-form videos fully based on the provided scripts by us ( you might just need to tweak a few words if needed ) which look realistic and feel "natural" to the viewers on platforms like YouTube Shorts, Instagram or
. Some of them are silently advertising products at the end but the key is that it doesn't sound like an ad but rather a native short-form video which a real person/influencer would record with their iPhone. There are a few styles such as just a calm "sit down" video ( where there's only one image and the influencer would just talk for 2 minutes ) or other ones where there're a few "shots" of them with a few seconds each and the scenes change but it's really not difficult at all - just a few more generations and then connecting them in CapCut.





The process is straightforward:

Getting our scripts ready and approved, using your own creativity and generating high quality base images using tools like Nano Banana Pro, turning these images into video clips using platforms like Veo3, Kling or HeyGen and for voice ElevenLabs, cuts and trimming, other minor adjustments such as background audio effects if needed ( like supermarket background audio ). Whole process is 90% just creating the right images/video clips etc, we might not even do transitions or captions so there won't be much editing skill needed. Everything is shown clearly in the training.



You’ll be creating a lot of videos a day but these are not complex edits AT ALL. Difficulty level: 6/10 ( again, 80% is just generating the rate "input" images and later just animating them with voice. That's it )





Here are visual examples of what the videos look like ( NOT OURS ):

1. 
/reel/DTty7hsAHe_/

2. 
/reel/DT0R9KgDkuW/

3. 
/reel/DSc75hsDQV6/

4. 
/reel/DT8pDFngXfp/

5. 
/reel/DUOAHm3kY7P/



( In your application, let us know your thoughts, do you think you can easily recreate them - what tools would you use and why? )





Training & onboarding ( this is the biggest advantage )

Once hired, you will receive structured video tutorials. In total, we have a few hours available, though most people don’t need all of it. The workflow is clear so no missing steps and no “figure it out yourself.”







Daily workload ( important )

You’ll create around 10 to 20+ videos per day ( 1 to 2 min long - we’ll start with a smaller amount and later increase it - won't negatively affect your monthly pay. We just want to make it easier for you to start - ultimately we'll be doing 20+ but making sure it's under 8-10h a day, at first it may take you longer and we may work harder - but once learned it easily becomes manageable ).

In reality, you'd have exactly 4 unique "AI influencers" but all of 4 them have the same scripts to use, you'd just need to change a few words to help with the context ( some of them might be talking only about "dogs" but some about "cats" so just need to change a few words to make it all make sense ) and you could use the same image prompts to generate almost identical images for each influencer. In reality it’s just 2 to 6 original videos PER INFLUENCER ( 4 of them ) and each with a very similar structure. Once trained, this is very manageable.



Your job is simple:

Create the videos, export them, and send them to us daily on 
.

That’s it. No posting. No account management. No stress.







Equipment & storage ( we make this easy )

You’ll need a good computer that can smoothly handle 1080p/light 4k video editing ( we’ll do 1080p but we’re going to work on multiple browser tabs ), a stable internet connection, and at least 16GB of RAM and 250GB+ of fast storage AVAILABLE. 1TB+ of SSD storage is preferred ( make sure it’s SSD and not old and slow HDD ).



If you need to buy storage/RAM ( for example, a 1TB SSD for around $100 ), we will refund you. This is required ONLY to save you time and speed up your workflow so you can be more efficient since it can be a couple GB of files a day ( you can later remove them after sending them to us. )



There also may be small subscription costs which you’d have to cover later if needed ( only around $10 a month ) for services like iCloud+ on iPhone/iPad or 
 Nitro - we refund those as well.







Tools & software ( HUGE upside )

You get FREE access to ALL paid tools that cost us hundreds of dollars per month, including:

- AI avatar tools like HeyGen or Veo3,

- Copywriting software like ChatGPT+, Grok or Claude,

- Editing software like CapCut PRO on Desktop,

- and our CUSTOM voice-over tools like ElevenLabs,

We provide logins, instructions, and full support.

( ALL OF THEM ARE WORTH $500+ MONTHLY )





Work environment & communication

You’ll have a private 1:1 chat with our manager and separate one to send your daily work in, work fully remotely through 
, receive clear feedback, and be treated as a long-term tea
mber, not disposable labor.

No stressful interviews. No micromanagement. No slow
s back and forth.







Responsibilities

- Adjust our scripts for the context

- Create videos from start to finish.

- Export and send them.

- Apply feedback and improve.

- Prepare scripts for the next day.

- Organize files properly.

- Communicate clearly.

- Hit deadlines without reminders.

That’s it. Simple, repetitive, and enjoyable.







This job is perfect for you if

You’re looking for long-term stability ( months or years ), you’re willing to learn, tech-savvy, creative, organized, and able to focus consistently. You already have video creation/editing experience. Already done some AI influencers related jobs and have good experience in: Google VEO3, Nano Banana Pro, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, CapCut PRO and other similar tools. Your computer can handle multiple tabs open ( A LOT of them ). You care about doing things properly, understand and speak English well, respond to messages quickly, and can work up to 6 days per week. You’re a young, talented, smart individual. You’re okay with a slightly heavier learning phase in the first week, you’re not afraid to ask questions, you’re reliable and honest about mistakes, and you either already have or can get an iPhone device ( used only for specific verification codes - refunded if needed. You can even get some used iPhone 8 for like $40 which works ).

We value dedication, reliability, and improvement more than raw talent.







This job is not for you if

You’re looking for quick money, disappear without communication, can’t focus, you’re on the older side and have never edited 1 video in your life, never played with the AI tools mentioned above, your computer can’t handle having multiple tabs open at the same time, have unstable internet, refuse feedback, rush work carelessly, avoid consistency, or cannot communicate in English.







Salary & payments

This is a full-time position, starting at 6 days per week, under 10 hours per day. ( ultimately under 8h once you become very efficient, which our manager will help you achieve and it won't impact your salary working less - quite the opposite! )



Starting salary ranges from around $440-$540/month based on experience, with the potential in the future to increase to $540+ based on a few factors such as performance, dedication, and quality of work.



Payments are monthly, in any currency or method available in your country. ( we’ll try )



To build trust, we’re offering to pay you $100 after the first week of working with us, with the remaining balance at month end. ( we already got scammed by other platforms so please respect this )



And remember, we pay $500+ dollars/month for paid tools so you can get them for FREE meaning your pay is actually 100% profit + refunds for any costs of yours. ( meaning in theory your total compensation is closer to $1000+ including tool access )







Hiring process (step-by-step)

- Please re-read this job post carefully and only then submit your application.

- In your job application, make sure to set the right title and answer every point.

- We will review it and reach out with an extra message if accepted.

- We'll send you a Google Form to fill out with contact info, etc.

- You’ll be invited to our 
 server and will get your 1:1 chat.

- You'll complete the training and take notes of it to learn everything.

- We'll give you access to all the tools and refund any required purchases.

- You'll officially start creating videos for Organic Media and get hired.

Simple and effective.







Why this is a real opportunity

No confusion, no guessing, no unpaid trials. You get real structured video training on Loom, real tools, real support, and real long-term growth - including potential promotion to coach or lead roles.

Some jobs may offer to pay more, but very few:

Teach you properly step by step, invest in you, respect your time, and give you paid tools for free.







How to apply (pay attention)

Your application title must start with the first word “ Influencer ”:

“ Influencer: (…) “

Applications without this will be ignored.





In your application, please include the following:

- Your detailed thoughts on the 5 videos linked above,

- Your past experience ( or none - that’s fine ),

- Links to any past work or simple edits,

- a detailed introduction about yourself,

- Your daily routine and availability,

- Why you want this opportunity and why we should pick you over someone else. ( why you’re special )

- and detailed answers to these 15 questions:



1. Do you have experience using CapCut on DESKTOP? How long have you been using it, and what type of videos do you usually create with it?

2. Which AI video tools have you personally used? ( For example: VEO, Kling, Nano Banana Pro, Seedream 4,5, HeyGen, Vozo, etc.) Briefly describe what you used them for.

3. When you watch short-form videos that reuse existing footage, are you able to recognize patterns such as hooks, pacing, avatar placement, and caption timing? Please explain how you notice these patterns.

4. We work with very detailed step-by-step SOPs that specify exactly which clips to use and how to assemble them. How do you typically work when instructions are extremely clear and structured?

5. If you are unsure about a task or something does not match the instructions, what do you do?

6. When generating AI videos, what are the most common problems you run into? (for example: bad lip sync, weird hands, low realism, wrong lighting, artifacts, etc.)

7. Would you say you’re more of a creative problem-solver who looks for shortcuts, loopholes, or ways around limitations, or someone who prefers to strictly follow rules and structure?

8. Have you ever had to regenerate the same AI scene or just an image multiple times to get a usable result? What usually goes wrong and how do you fix it?

9. When working with AI tools, do you prefer experimenting freely or strictly following a proven workflow? Why?

10. Tell us about your PC specs, how much RAM and Available Storage and is it a PC or laptop/Macbook. Also, do you already have an iPhone/iPad? If so, which model is it/generation?

11. Are you good at learning? Meaning if you want to learn something by for example, watching YouTube tutorials - do you usually rewatch it or take notes? Or just watch it once and try it yourself?

12. Describe exactly how you usually organize your project files when working on multiple videos at the same time.

For example: how you name folders, how you separate drafts vs finals, and how you avoid losing assets.

13. Take a look at the job post once again and find the 5 video example links we've included above. Watch all of them fully and let us know your overall thoughts, how do you think they were created - what tools would you use and why? Please cover the whole process in detail ( these aren't our videos but very similar )

14. What are your long-term plans or goals with this opportunity?

15. To confirm that you’ve read everything carefully, please tell us your favorite meal and dessert, as well as a restaurant in your country. Explain why someone from outside your country should absolutely try it. :)





Do not use ChatGPT or any AI to fully write your application. Be real, honest and detailed. We value spelling mistakes over perfect, AI generated responses. ( Yes, we can detect AI generated responses and it just isn't a good look on you )



You must also follow our Instagram: ( 
/organicxmedia )







Final note

We are hiring ONLY 1 PERSON for this role and are focused strictly on long-term relationships ( months + )

If you are dedicated, reliable, and willing to learn, this can be a very comfortable long-term position. Good luck!

title: Healthcare Recruiter
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a motivated and results-driven Healthcare Recruiter to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and placing qualified professionals across a wide range of healthcare and educational specialties.



This role requires excellent communication skills, strong attention to detail, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, target-driven environment. The successful candidate will manage the full recruitment lifecycle, from sourcing candidates to onboarding.



Key Responsibilities



Source, recruit, and screen qualified candidates for healthcare and educational roles, including but not limited to:



Speech-Language Pathologists (SLP)



Occupational Therapists (OT)



Behavioral Health Professionals (school counselors, social workers, psychologists, intervention specialists)



Licensed Vocational Nurses (LVN) / Registered Nurses (RN)



Paraprofessionals / Instructional Aides



Special Education Teachers (mild/moderate and moderate/severe)



CT Scan Technologists



X-Ray Technologists



MRI Technologists



Lab Technicians



Radiation Therapists



Emergency Room (ER) staff and Registered Nurses



Manage the full recruitment lifecycle from job posting, sourcing, and candidate outreach to interview coordination, offer negotiation, and onboarding.



Conduct candidate screening interviews and evaluate qualifications.



Build and maintain strong relationships with candidates, clients, and internal teams.



Ensure compliance with company policies and relevant local and federal regulations.



Track recruitment activity and report key recruitment metrics.



Work closely with hiring managers to understand staffing needs and implement effective recruitment strategies.



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field (preferred).



2+ years of recruiting experience, preferably within healthcare, education, or staffing industries.



Strong understanding of recruitment processes, sourcing strategies, and applicant tracking systems (ATS).



Excellent communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.



Ability to work independently in a remote environment.



Strong problem-solving and time management skills.



Experience recruiting for U.S. or Canadian markets is a plus.

title: Virtual Dental Front Desk Receptionist
description:
Virtual Dental Front Desk Receptionist — LV Dental (Las Vegas, NV) | Full-Time | Remote

JOB TITLE (for OnlineJobs.ph field)

Virtual Dental Receptionist / Dental Front Desk Virtual Assistant

WHATSAPP ME DIRECTLY +1 (714)
ABOUT US

LV Dental is a modern, patient-centered dental practice located in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA. We utilize advanced dental technology, a streamlined digital workflow, and a personalized approach to patient care. Our team is close-knit, collaborative, and committed to delivering an exceptional experience to every patient — from their first phone call through their final visit.



We are a stable, growing practice that believes in building long-term relationships — with our patients and with our tea
mbers. This is a long-term position. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us.



"We are NOT looking for someone to simply answer phones. We are looking for someone who creates an exceptional patient experience and grows with our practice."



POSITION OVERVIEW

We are hiring a full-time Virtual Dental Front Desk Receptionist to work remotely from the Philippines in direct support of our US-based dental office. You will serve as the first point of contact for our patients — managing appointments, insurance verifications, patient calls, and follow-ups entirely from your home office.



This role requires prior dental front office experience. Candidates must be familiar with how a US dental practice operates, have a working knowledge of US dental insurance (particularly PPO plans), and ideally have hands-on experience with Dentrix or Archy practice management software.



Working Hours: Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST/PDT), Las Vegas, Nevada timezone.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Answer inbound patient calls, texts, and
s promptly and professionally

Schedule, confirm, and manage patient appointments using Dentrix or Archy

Verify dental insurance eligibility and benefits, with a focus on PPO plans

Present treatment plans to patients and clearly explain financial options

Process patient payments, manage account balances, and record transactions accurately

Maintain complete and up-to-date patient records in the practice management system

Coordinate with the clinical team to ensure efficient daily operations

Address patient concerns and complaints with empathy, patience, and professionalism

Conduct follow-up outreach for recall appointments and unscheduled treatment plans

Perform additional administrative tasks as needed to support overall office efficiency



REQUIRED HARD SKILLS

The following are non-negotiable requirements. Please do not apply if you do not meet these qualifications:



Minimum 1 year of dental front office experience, preferably with a US-based dental practice

Hands-on experience with Dentrix, Archy, Eaglesoft, or a comparable dental practice management platform

Solid understanding of US dental insurance, including PPO plans, eligibility verification, and benefits explanation

Proficiency in Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Docs) and/or Microsoft Office

Experience managing high-volume inbound phone calls in a professional setting

Excellent spoken and written English — patients must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably

Reliable high-speed internet (minimum 20 Mbps; wired connection strongly preferred)

Noise-cancelling headset and a dedicated, quiet home workspace

Personal computer or laptop running Windows 10 or macOS (no tablets or mobile-only setups)



REQUIRED SOFT SKILLS

Beyond technical qualifications, the ideal candidate demonstrates the following:



A warm, patient-centered approach — a genuine desire to help people, reflected in every interaction

Strong organizational and detail-oriented habits — no missed appointments, no overlooked follow-ups

A proactive and solutions-focused mindset — you address problems before they escalate

Reliability and punctuality — our patients depend on consistent availability; we depend on you

A collaborative spirit — you communicate clearly and support your teammates

Composure under pressure — dental workflows can be fast-paced; you remain steady and professional

A growth mindset — you seek continuous improvement and welcome new responsibilities

Discretion and trustworthiness — patient information is strictly confidential and handled with care

Bilingual proficiency in English/Spanish or English/Vietnamese is a strong advantage.



COMPENSATION WHATSAPP ME DIRECTLY +1 (714)
Starting Rate $5.00 – $8.00 USD per hour, based on experience

Employment Type Full-Time, Long-Term

Performance Bonus Yes — evaluated monthly or quarterly based on KPIs

Salary Review After 90 days of proven performance

Payment Method Wise, Payoneer, or Direct Bank Transfer (weekly or bi-weekly)

We value our tea
mbers. Compensation grows in proportion to demonstrated skills and work ethic.



SCHEDULE

Full-time, approximately 40 hours per week

Monday through Friday — no weekends

Pacific Time Zone (PST/PDT), Las Vegas, Nevada

Occasional overtime during peak periods (compensated accordingly)

EQUIPMENT & TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

Candidates must have all of the following prior to starting:



Requirement Minimum Standard

Internet Speed 20 Mbps or higher (wired preferred)

Computer / Laptop Windows 10 or macOS — no tablets

Headset Noise-cancelling microphone required

Webcam Required for team video meetings

Backup Internet Mobile hotspot as a contingency is a plus

Workspace Dedicated, quiet, and professional-sounding environment



WHAT WE OFFER WHATSAPP ME DIRECTLY +1 (714)
Competitive hourly rate with performance-based bonuses

Stable, long-term employment with a growing dental practice

Monday through Friday schedule with no weekend commitments

A supportive, respectful team environment where your contributions are recognized

Structured onboarding and training on our systems and workflows

Clear opportunities for advancement — we promote from within

Fully remote position — work from your home in the Philippines

IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

The candidate we are looking for:



Has prior remote experience supporting a US-based dental or medical practice

Is confident and articulate when communicating with US patients by phone

Can independently manage a busy appointment calendar with minimal supervision

Takes professional pride in every patient interaction and consistently represents the practice well



HOW TO APPLY WHATSAPP ME DIRECTLY +1 (714)
Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



To be considered for this position, please submit a message that includes all of the following:



An updated resume that highlights any dental or medical front office experience

A short voice or video recording (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself — this allows us to assess your English communication skills directly. Please use a shareable link via Loom, Google Drive, or Dropbox.

A written response to the following question: "What dental practice management software have you used, and can you describe a situation in which you handled a difficult patient over the phone?"

A screenshot of your current internet speed test result from speedtest.net

Written confirmation that you are available to work Monday through Friday on Pacific Standard Time (PST/PDT)

Application Subject Line: LV Dental – Virtual Receptionist Application – [Your Full Name]



Every application is reviewed individually. We are seeking the right long-term fit — please take the time to submit a thorough and thoughtful application.



POSITION SUMMARY WHATSAPP ME DIRECTLY +1 (714)
Location Remote — Philippines

Company LV Dental, Las Vegas, NV, USA

Employment Type Full-Time, Long-Term

Schedule Monday – Friday, Pacific Time (PST/PDT)

Compensation $5.00 – $8.00/hr USD + Performance Bonus

Required Software Dentrix / Archy preferred

Core Requirement Dental front office + US insurance knowledge

Language English required; Spanish or Vietnamese a plus

title: Elite Cold Caller
description:
Job Opportunity: Cold Caller for Real Estate Wholesaling Company



REQUIRMENTS :

1) Highly skilled.

2) Positive track record of producing leads and deals. 

3) Longterm position (2 years +)

4) Available to work until 8pm PST and on Saturdays

5) Must be male, currently not hiring females for this position



OUR COMPANY HAS A HIGH STANDARD OF A QUALITY TEAM. IT IS REQUIRED THAT YOU SEND A VIDEO OR RECORDING OF YOU MAKING COLD CALLS IN ORDER TO APPLY.



WE WILL NOT HIRE A COMPANY OR A TEAM OF CALLERS. WE WILL ONLY HIRE INDIVIDUALS WHO WORK DIRECTLY WITH US.





Company: COOPERS HOME BUYERS

Location: Remote and virtual

Position: Cold Caller for Real Estate Sales



Job Description: As a Cold Caller, you will be talking to homeowners on the phone to identify potential real estate off market leads. Your goal will be to discover if the homeowner would like to sell their home. After you have determined that the homeowner is looking to sell, you will ask them a series of questions to qualify the lead and input their responses into our CRM. You will set an appointment between the lead and our acquisitions manager.



Compensation: We offer an hourly wage plus a generous bonus every time you identify a lead that sells their home to us.





Responsibilities:

Outbound cold calls to potential sellers and property owners.

Identify the the property owners needs and motivation.

Educate the home owners on who we are and how we can help.

Qualify leads based on predetermined criteria and gather essential information.

Schedule appointments for our acquisitions manager with interested and qualified sellers.

Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all communications and interactions using an online tool called a CRM.



Requirements:

title: ???? WE’RE HIRING: Video Editor for a Fast-Growing Supplement Brand ????????
description:
The Role



You're editing direct response video ads that sell. Not brand films. Not vlogs. Not cinematic transitions with mood lighting. Ads that stop the scroll, hold attention, and make people buy.



You'll take written ad briefs from our Creative Director and Copywriters and bring them to life — sourcing the right footage, syncing visuals to voiceover, pacing every cut for maximum impact, and making sure the final product looks native, not produced.



The smallest details make the biggest differences. A wrong clip kills the hook. A slow transition loses her. A misplaced caption buries the message. You obsess over these details because they're the difference between an ad shown to millions and one that dies at $50 spend.



---



## What You'll Do



**Onboarding:**



- Learn our brand guidelines, tone, and visual style

- Study our winning ads and understand exactly why they work

- Understand our avatar — who we're talking to, what she feels, why she stops scrolling



**Ongoing:**



- Edit 15–20 ad briefs per week

- Source relevant B-roll from YouTube, stock sites, and other platforms — find the RIGHT clips that match the script and hook, not random footage

- Use AI tools (image generation, video generation, voiceover AI, background removal, etc.) to speed up production and enhance creative quality

- Upload and organize edited ads into specific folders with correct resolutions (1080×1080, 1080×1920, 1920×1080)

- Communicate with copywriters and Creative Director to ensure ad concepts are executed correctly

- Listen to feedback and apply it — for existing ads and new ones

- Learn our Ads Strategy to understand what makes a "winner" vs a "loser"

- Complete a weekly 30-minute ad analysis and review on concepts you've created



---



## What You Need To Know



- How to source footage strategically (YouTube, Pexels, Storyblocks, etc.)

- How to match visuals to voiceover — intentional clips, not random B-roll

- Pacing for direct response ads — fast, punchy, no dead space

- Text and caption placement that's readable and scroll-stopping

- Basic color correction and audio cleanup

- Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut

- AI tools for creative production — image generators (Midjourney, Freepik, Leonardo, Ideogram), AI voiceover tools (ElevenLabs or similar), AI video tools (Runway, Pika, Kling, etc.), and background removal/upscaling tools. You don't need to be an expert in all of them, but you need to be comfortable using AI to move faster and produce better work.



---



## Qualifications



- 1+ year editing video ads (not vlogs, not YouTube videos — ads)

- 1+ year working with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

- Experience editing eCommerce or direct response ads specifically

- Comfortable using AI tools for image generation, voiceover, video generation, and creative enhancement

- Experience working in a team environment and understanding individual roles



---



## Character Traits



- Excruciatingly high attention to detail with every edit

- Artistic and creative-oriented mindset

- Visual communicator and storyteller

- High curiosity and an active imagination

- Strong willingness to do the "boring" work required

- Great communicator — responsive, clear, no guesswork

- Time-efficient, but willing to spend extra time to get it right

- Coachable with a genuine desire to grow your skill set



---



## This Is NOT For You If:



- You are not a creative person

- You don't enjoy the editing process

- You think "creative" means slow transitions and mood lighting

- You don't like a high-operating, fast-feedback environment

- You're unorganized or miss deadlines

- You can't take direct feedback

- You don't understand direct response or eCommerce

- You refuse to learn or use AI tools



---



## What We Provide



- All scripts written for you — you focus on execution

- Clear direction on what visuals we need for every brief

- Stock footage subscriptions and tools

- AI tool access and resources

- Fast feedback loops so you improve quickly

- Long-term work if you're good

- A team that actually knows what converts



---



## Growth Potential



We value growth and development. With strong performance, your path as a Video Editor includes:



- Priority on editing ads — you get the bulk of requests

- Higher pay as you prove yourself

- Creative Director role — lead and manage other editors, focus on high-level strategy



---



## How To Apply



Send us:



1. Links to 2–3 direct response video ads you've edited (not brand videos, not vlogs — ads that sell a product)

2. A 2-sentence explanation of why each ad works (what makes it convert, not just "looks good")

3. A short example of how you've used any AI tool in your editing workflow (screenshot, before/after, or just describe it)

4. Your availability and hourly rate



Subject line:** "Elixir Video Editor — I edit ads that convert

title: Virtual Nursing & Quality Officer
description:
We are seeking a registered nurse based in the Philippines to provide remote clinical review and quality auditing services for an Australian home care provider.



This role focuses on desktop clinical reviews, quality audits of care plans, and data integrity checks to support compliance with Australian aged care requirements. No direct client contact or clinical decision-making authority is required.



The role operates under the supervision and delegation of Australian-based clinical leadership.





Key Responsibilities



Clinical Review & Documentation Audit

 • Review nursing assessments, progress notes, and care documentation for completeness, accuracy, and clinical appropriateness

 • Conduct quality audits of Support at Home help plans

 • Identify gaps, inconsistencies, and risks in care documentation

 • Ensure documentation aligns with assessed needs and funded services



Quality & Compliance Support

 • Audit client documentation

 • Provider clinical governance frameworks

 • Flag potential compliance issues for escalation to Australian-based clinicians

 • Support continuous improvement by identifying recurring documentation or care planning issues



Data & Systems Review

 • Review client records within care management systems (e.g. Lookout or similar platforms)

 • Validate service schedules, budgets, and clinical notes for data accuracy

 • Assist with preparation of audit evidence and reporting summaries



Reporting & Collaboration

 • Provide structured written review findings and recommendations

 • Participate in virtual meetings with Australian clinical and care teams

 • Maintain strict confidentiality and data security standards





Required Qualifications & Experience



Essential

 • Registered Nurse qualification recognised in the Philippines

 • Current Philippine nursing registration (PRC)

 • Minimum 2 years nursing experience, preferably in Aged Care, Community Care or Chronic disease management

 • Strong clinical documentation and audit skills

 • Excellent written English communication



Desirable

 • Experience with Australian aged care or NDIS documentation

 • Familiarity with Care plans / help plans, Clinical audits

 • Remote or offshore healthcare support roles



?



Skills & Attributes

 • High attention to detail

 • Strong analytical and review capability

 • Understanding of clinical risk and escalation

 • Professional judgement and discretion

 • Comfortable working with Australian time zones

 • Strong data privacy and confidentiality awareness



Employment Type

 • Full-time or Part-time



Why Join Us

 • Stable, long-term remote role

 • Exposure to Australian aged care clinical governance

 • Opportunity to work in a quality-focused, non-bedside nursing role

 • Supportive Australian clinical leadership and clear scope of practice

We’re looking for someone who is results-driven, creative and eager to grow with the company.



Interested?



Send your application and examples of ads or creatives you have made.

title: Operations Manager - Healthcare
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Director of Operations to oversee non-clinical operations across a medical practice and surgery center.



This is a leadership role for someone who knows how to create structure, improve workflows, manage teams, support financial performance, and keep operations running smoothly in a fast-paced healthcare setting.



What You’ll Do



1. Oversee day-to-day operations across both facilities

2. Manage scheduling, patient flow, front desk, billing coordination, and admin functions

3. Build systems and workflows that improve efficiency and accountability

4. Support revenue performance through stronger utilization, collections support, and operational follow-through

5. Monitor KPIs, team performance, and operational results

6. Help manage budgets, forecasting, and overall business performance

7. Work closely with billing and revenue cycle teams on collections, denials, and receivables

8. Lead, coach, and hold teams accountable to clear expectations

9. Improve patient experience and resolve service or process gaps

10. Ensure compliance with healthcare standards, audits, and documentation requirements

11. Manage vendors and support operational scaling as the business grows



What We Need



- 5+ years in healthcare operations, practice management, or similar leadership

- Strong experience managing teams, departments, and operational performance

- Solid understanding of medical practice workflows, revenue cycle, and compliance

- Experience building processes, improving systems, and driving execution

- Strong leadership and decision-making skills

- Comfortable working closely with physicians and cross-functional teams

- Bachelor’s degree in Healthcare Administration, Business, or related field is a plus

- Experience in specialty practice or surgery center operations is a plus



Tools



- EMR/EHR systems

- Billing and revenue cycle tools

- Excel and reporting dashboards

- Communication tools

- Workflow or SOP platforms



Perks



Paid US holidays

Paid wellness days

Health & wellness allowance

Monthly profit sharing

Leadership and operations upskilling

Long-term opportunity
