title: Hiring 4 Tax Accountants (AU)
description:
We believe our people are the foundation of our success. Our culture is built on respect, collaboration, and supporting one another.



We strive to create a workplace where employees feel valued, heard, and empowered to grow both personally and professionally. Our leadership is committed to fostering open communication, professional development, and a positive environment where everyone can perform at their best.



If you're looking for a company that values your contribution and supports your growth, we’d love to have you on our team.



Why Join Bravo?

We believe great people deserve great support. Here’s what you can expect when you join us:

-Competitive and stable full-time work from home opportunity

-HMO and Life Insurance coverage

-13th Month Pay

-Government Contributions (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG)

-Sick Leave and Vacation Leave benefits

-Free Training and Professional Development opportunities

-Monthly Virtual Employee Engagement activities (with prizes!)

-Fun Company Get-Togethers

-An Annual Christmas Party that our team truly looks forward to

-Year-End Package



We make sure our team not only works hard, but also feels appreciated and celebrated.



About the Role

We are currently looking for four (4) experienced AU Tax Accountants to join our growing team.

In this role, you will work closely with an Australian firm handling tax compliance and accounting services for a diverse client base. This position offers the opportunity to further develop your expertise in Australian taxation while working in a supportive and collaborative environment.



Key Responsibilities

-Prepare and review Australian Tax Returns, BAS, and Financial Statements

-Ensure compliance with Australian tax regulations and legislation

-Provide tax planning support or advice to clients or internal stakeholders

-Analyze financial statements and provide insights where needed

-Maintain accurate financial records and documentation



What We’re Looking For

-2–5+ years of Australian Tax and Business Services experience

-Ability to prepare tax returns for Individuals, Partnerships, Companies (including Group Companies), and Trusts

-Experience in preparing and reviewing Financial Statements

-Solid understanding of Australian tax legislation, including:

Capital Gains Tax (CGT)

Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT)

Division 7A compliance and application

-Experience in preparing IAS and BAS

-Experience in tax planning is an advantage

-Strong analytical and communication skills

-Proficient in using Xero, XPM, and other accounting software

-Positive and proactive attitude with a fun team spirit

-Bookkeeping experience is a plus



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: AI Video Creator & Editor
description:
We're a fast-growing 8-figure health brand scaling aggressively through paid video ads on Meta and TikTok. We need a video editor who doesn't just make things look good — but makes ads that convert.

You'll be responsible for:

— Turning scripts and raw clips into scroll-stopping video ads (30-60 sec)

— Editing for direct response, not just aesthetics

— Working within a fast feedback loop (we give notes on every video)

— Understanding hook rates, pacing, and what makes someone stop scrolling

— Collaborating with our creative team using AI-assisted workflows (Claude, Loom, etc.)

What we're looking for:

— Proven experience editing video ads that ran as paid media (not spec work)

— You can show real results (hook rates, CTR, ROAS)

— Fast turnaround — you can deliver a first draft same day

— You take feedback like a pro and come back with a better V2

— Familiar with Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or similar

Our hiring process:



Application form + portfolio review

Interview call

Paid trial (few days — we provide scripts + a Loom walkthrough)

One-week trial (7 video ads with feedback loops)

One-month employment with performance reviews



This is a paid role from day one. If you think in conversions, not just transitions — apply.

title: PAID OPPORTUNITY: Graphic Designer for High-Converting E-commerce Ads (DTC / Paid Social)
description:
We’re looking for a talented graphic designer to create high-converting static ads for a fast-growing DTC skincare brand.



This role is focused on designing scroll-stopping creatives for paid social platforms like Meta and TikTok, so an understanding of performance-driven design is important. You should have a strong eye for clean, modern design and know how to balance aesthetics with conversion.



You’ll be creating static ad creatives, iterating on winning designs, and developing new concepts based on performance insights. We’re looking for someone who can move quickly, test ideas, and continuously improve creative output.



Ideally, you have experience working with e-commerce brands and can show a portfolio of ad creatives, not just branding work. You understand what makes an ad convert, from hooks to layout to visual hierarchy, and can design with intention.



We’re building a brand focused on simplicity, clarity, and real results, and we want creatives that reflect that.



To be considered, please send your portfolio along with 2–3 ad creatives you’ve made that performed well.

title: Content Editor & Graphic Designer
description:
Position Overview



We are looking for a high-output Content Editor & Graphic Designer to support a fast-growing home service brand. This role focuses on transforming raw field content into engaging, high-converting social media posts and marketing assets.



This is a monthly retainer role with consistent work, clear systems, and long-term growth opportunity.



What You’ll Be Doing



Video Editing



Edit short-form content (Reels, TikToks,
)



Add captions, hooks, sound effects, and transitions



Cut long-form footage into multiple short clips



Follow proven content structures (we provide)



Graphic Design



Social media graphics



Before/after visuals



Thumbnails



Flyers, postcards, and simple ad creatives



Light branding work (using existing brand guidelines)





Workflow System (IMPORTANT)



Tasks are submitted through a priority queue system



You will work through tasks in order of priority



Content will be sent to you and you complete either video editing or graphic design in your own time.

This is why part time is expected.



Turnaround expectations:



Short-form videos: 24–48 hours



Graphics: 24–72 hours



Clear communication is required daily





What We’re Looking For



Strong experience with:



Video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)



Graphic design (Canva, Photoshop, Illustrator)



Understanding of short-form content that grabs attention



Ability to follow structure AND improve it



Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality



Reliable communication (daily check-ins)





Bonus If You:



Understand social media growth (hooks, retention, storytelling)



Have experience with service-based businesses



Can suggest improvements, not just execute





What Success Looks Like



Content is posted consistently (daily/weekly)



Videos are engaging and not boring



Turnaround times are fast



You require minimal hand-holding after onboarding





Compensation



Monthly retainer (based on experience)



Consistent workload with long-term opportunity



Performance bonuses available based on output and quality





SUBMIT APPLICATION WITH SAMPLE EDITING AND GRAPHIC DESIGN

SEND FINAL PRODUCTS TO MY WHATSAPP (219)
, My name is Joel.



Part 1 Sample Editing:



Turn raw footage into a 20–30 second short-form video for
/Instagram.



Use this link to the raw footage I need you to edit: 


/drive/folders/1PnnmjQaAnq4L26ipP3y3DeeSJvGfSl63?usp=sharing



Hook in first 2–3 seconds

Captions (if needed, easy to read, not cluttered)

Clean cuts (no dead space)

Add light sound effects or music

Keep it simple—not over-edited



Part 2: Sample Graphic Design



Create a social media graphic for a house wash promotion.



Use this same link for raw pictures you can use: 
/drive/folders/1PnnmjQaAnq4L26ipP3y3DeeSJvGfSl63?usp=sharing



This must be a still picture.

title: Outbound Systems Architect (Instantly + GHL) – NOT a VA Role
description:
Monthly Salary: ?65,000 – ?75,000 PHP (Based on Experience)

Performance Bonuses: Uncapped (?600+ PHP per converted sale)

OTE Potential: ?100,000 – ?150,000+ PHP/month

Schedule: Full-Time | US Business Hours (Philippine Night Shift)



The Mission

We are not hiring a Virtual Assistant. We are hiring a Growth Operator and Technical Architect to own and scale our outbound engine. You will manage the system that connects cold outreach infrastructure to booked appointments. Your mission: No leaks. No missed opportunities. No broken systems.



Your Role: Architect of the Machine



Infrastructure & Deliverability (Instantly): Manage 20+ domains and 50+ inboxes. Maintain SPF, DKIM, and DMARC. Monitor warmup and rotate domains before deliverability drops (98% rule mindset).



Conversion Engine (GoHighLevel): Build a “Zero-Leak Pipeline.” Design multi-channel follow-ups (SMS,
, Voice) to drive 70–80%+ show-up rates. Deploy instant no-show recovery workflows (within 120 seconds).



Automation & Proprietary Workflows: Integrate Instantly ? GHL ? internal systems. Trigger our Physical Device Farm to generate custom lead screenshots. Enrich leads using Apollo/Lusha.



KPI Dashboard Architecture: Design and maintain a real-time "Source of Truth" dashboard (using GHL or external tools) that tracks infrastructure health (deliverability/bounce rates), top-of-funnel efficiency (positive reply rates), and bottom-of-funnel ROI (cost per showed appointment



Required Skills



Instantly.ai: Spintax, A/B testing, inbox rotation.



GoHighLevel: Advanced workflows, triggers, custom dashboards.



DNS Management: Cloudflare/DMARC/deliverability expert.



Automation: Zapier, Make, or API integrations.



Do Not Apply If



You are a general Virtual Assistant.



You require step-by-step instructions for execution.



You don't understand the "Why" behind
 deliverability.



To Apply



Include your specific experience with Instantly and GHL.



Attach a 2–3 minute Loom video explaining a complex workflow you built and how it solved a business problem.



Tell us your preferred automation tool and why.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation & Workflow Specialist – Dubsado + Zapier Migration Project
description:
Remote | Project-Based | Potential Ongoing Work



We are looking for an experienced GoHighLevel (GHL) automation specialist to migrate and rebuild our existing systems from Dubsado and Zapier into our white-label GHL platform (Alvéya).



This is a project-based role with the potential for ongoing work as the platform grows.



Project Overview



We currently use:



• Dubsado for proposals, contracts, and client workflows

• Zapier for onboarding automation and system integrations



We are transitioning these systems into Alvéya (GHL) and are looking for someone who can:



? rebuild workflows

? connect automations

? simplify and optimise the system



What You’ll Be Responsible For



System Migration



• Review existing Dubsado workflows and Zapier automations

• Rebuild workflows inside GoHighLevel

• Replace or replicate Zapier integrations within GHL where possible



Automation & Integration Setup



• Set up triggers, workflows, tags, and pipelines

• Recreate onboarding automations currently handled via Zapier

• Ensure systems communicate correctly (forms,
s, CRM updates)



Proposals & Contracts



• Recreate proposals and contracts inside GHL

• Ensure forms and agreements function smoothly



Client Journey Build



• Map and build the full client journey:

Lead ? Proposal ? Onboarding ? Project ? Completion



• Ensure the experience is seamless for both client and team



System Optimisation



• Identify ways to simplify workflows

• Reduce reliance on Zapier where possible

• Ensure the system is scalable as the business grows



Ideal Candidate



You are:



• highly experienced with GoHighLevel workflows and automation

• confident working with Zapier and integrations

• able to think strategically about system design (not just execution)

• detail-oriented and organised

• experienced with service-based business workflows



Experience migrating from Dubsado, HoneyBook, or similar CRM systems is highly preferred.



Bonus (Not Required)



• Experience with white-label GHL platforms

• Experience with digital agencies or website projects

• Familiarity with onboarding systems and client lifecycle design



Project Scope



This is a full system migration and optimisation project, including:



• workflows

• automations

• Zapier integrations

• proposals

• contracts

• pipelines



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of the system build from start to finish.



How to Apply



Please include:



• a brief overview of your experience with GoHighLevel and Zapier

• examples of workflows or automations you have built

• any experience migrating from Dubsado or similar systems



To confirm you have read this description, please include the word “automated” in your application.



Important



This role requires hands-on experience with GoHighLevel and automation systems.



General virtual assistants without technical automation experience will not be considered.

title: Recruitment & Sourcing Operator (Sales Talent – KPI Driven, Builder Role)
description:
We are hiring a Recruitment & Sourcing Operator responsible for finding and filtering high-performing sales talent (cold callers and acquisition specialists).



This is not a traditional recruiting role.



This is a results-driven, execution-heavy position where your job is to hunt, engage, and qualify candidates daily.



We are building a pipeline of A-players only — not average performers.



Work Structure



Starting: 4 hours per day (20 hours per week)



Clear daily output expectations



Opportunity to grow into full-time based on performance



Work can be done:



During your local evenings



No overnight US hours required



What You Will Be Doing



Actively sourcing candidates across:



 groups (primary)



LinkedIn



Job platforms



Sending 20–30+ outreach messages daily



Identifying where high-performing salespeople spend time online



Engaging candidates directly (not waiting for applications)



Sending candidates our structured application process



Reviewing submissions (audio + metrics)



Rejecting low performers immediately



Submitting only 1–3 qualified candidates per day



Performance Expectations (Non-Negotiable)



20–30+ outreach messages per day



Daily activity and output required



1–3 qualified candidates submitted per day



This is a KPI-driven role.

This is NOT “post and wait.”



What We Are Looking For



Strong attention to detail (follows instructions exactly)



Logical thinker (can evaluate candidates objectively)



Resourceful — can find candidates without being told exactly where



Comfortable rejecting people quickly



Consistent daily execution



Required



Active
 account (group sourcing + messaging)



LinkedIn account



Comfortable using multiple platforms to find candidates



Reliable internet and daily availability



Do NOT Apply If



You only post jobs and wait



You avoid making decisions or rejecting candidates



You need constant supervision



You are not results-driven



Compensation



$4–$5/hour



Performance-based bonuses for strong output



Opportunity to grow into a larger role supporting multiple businesses



Application Requirements (Strict)



To be considered, you must complete ALL steps:



1. Subject Line



Include the word: orange



2. Sourcing Plan (Required)



Answer this:



If you had to find 20 high-performing cold callers in the next 48 hours, what exact steps would you take?



Be specific:



Where would you go?



What would you do first?



How would you reach them?



3. Platform Proof



Provide:



Links to at least 3
 groups where you would find candidates



OR 3 places/platforms where you would source from



4. Short Audio (1–2 minutes)



Explain:



Why you are a good fit for this role



How you handle repetitive daily work



How you deal with rejecting candidates



(No scripts. Speak naturally.)



5. Experience (Optional but Preferred)



Briefly describe:



Any sourcing, recruiting, or outreach experience



Bottom Line



This role is for someone who can:



Execute daily



Think independently



Produce results



If you can consistently deliver qualified candidates, you will grow quickly.



If not, this will not be a fit.



:

title: Rockstar Customer Service Agent with Perfect English
description:
Job title: Customer Service Agent (Night Shift)

Salary: 35k-50k PHP per month [depending on experience]



Company description: Insomnia Visuals is a Los Angeles-based alternative streetwear and apparel brand with customers all over the world. We're a team of 15, 5 of whom are in the Philippines. Founder is also Fil-am and has been working with overseas PH workers for 10 years.



Job summary:

We're looking for a friendly, reliable Customer Service Agent to handle our customer communications during US daytime business hours (9am–5pm PST), which works out to night shift in the Philippines (12am - 8am). You'll be the first point of contact for our customers by answering questions, resolving issues, and just making sure people feel taken care of.



Day-to-day tasks include:

- Responding to customer
s and messages (order questions, shipping updates, returns)

- Managing tickets in Richpanel

- Coordinating with our fulfillment and supply chain teams on any order issues

- Processing refunds or replacements when needed

- Flagging recurring issues to help us improve



We're looking for someone dependable who takes pride in giving great service, a good attitude and has a willingness to figure things out. We have several Filipino tea
mbers already and love working with people from OnlineJobs.



MUST HAVE:

- 4+ years in an e-commerce customer service role.

- Experience working with Shopify

- Experience working for E-commerce brands (bonus points: also in apparel or fashion)

- Absolutely perfect written and spoken English.

- Comfortable working night shift.



The above are MUST-HAVEs, meaning if you DON'T have all of these requirements, I will immediately archive your application.



Qualifications:

- Must have reliable, high-speed internet and a working webcam for video calls

- Able to work independently without constant check-ins

- Available during the full shift window.

- ON TIME, EVERY DAY.



What we offer:

- Competitive pay and room to grow within the company.

- A chill, supportive team that communicates openly.

- Consistent full-time hours.



How to apply:

Include "
" in the subject line of your application (this helps us know you read the whole thing!). Submit your resume along with a short cover letter explaining why you'd be a great fit. Please write it in your own words. Absolutely NO copy-paste or letters written with AI. If we like your application, we'll reach out with a link to schedule an interview.



Also, if you don't apply with at least 5 points I will not take it seriously!

title: Booking Statement Assistant
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Booking Statement Assistant to support financial reporting for multiple short-term rental properties.



The ideal candidate is reliable, analytical, and experienced with spreadsheets. This role focuses on organizing booking data from platforms such as Airbnb, VRBO, and 
 and preparing daily or monthly statements.



You will work closely with the Operations Manager and Accounting team to ensure booking data and revenue reports are accurate and up to date.



Key Responsibilities

Booking Data & Statement Preparation



• Review daily bookings from Airbnb, VRBO, and 

• Record booking details in Google Sheets / Excel

• Track revenue, cleaning fees, platform fees, and payouts

• Organize bookings by property and date

• Prepare daily or weekly booking statements



Financial Tracking & Reconciliation



• Verify platform payout reports and booking totals

• Compare booking data with platform transaction records

• Identify discrepancies or missing payouts

• Assist in preparing monthly revenue reports for property owners



Reporting & Documentation



• Maintain organized financial records and spreadsheets

• Prepare simple reports summarizing bookings and revenue

• Assist the operations team with data and reporting requests

• Support statement preparation for internal accounting



Requirements



• 1–2 years experience in data entry, reporting, accounting support, or property management preferred

• Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Ability to organize large amounts of booking data

• Good written English communication skills

• Ability to work independently and follow structured processes



Preferred Experience



Experience with the following tools is a plus:



Airbnb

VRBO



Hospitable

Google Sheets / Excel

Basic accounting or financial reporting



Experience working with short-term rental data or financial reports is highly preferred.

title: EA Opportunity: Virtual Executive Assistant - Founder & CEO Support
description:
Virtual Executive Assistant (Female) (Founder & CEO Support)

Remote | Vera Outsourcing



About Vera Outsourcing



Vera Outsourcing provides subscription-based Virtual Executive Assistant (VEA) support to founders and CEOs across the United States. Our mission is simple: help leaders regain time, focus, and operational clarity by working with highly capable Executive Assistants who keep things organized and moving forward.



We believe great assistants are more than task managers, they are execution partners who bring structure, reliability, and 
ntum to the businesses they support.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a proactive, organized, and dependable Administrative Assistant to support our executives or supervisors in a remote work environment. The ideal candidate will excel in managing meetings, sending invites, updating schedules, taking detailed notes, and following up on action items until they are completed. This role requires strong communication, time management, and multitasking abilities, along with a high level of professionalism and discretion.



Key Responsibilities

• Attend meetings, take accurate notes, and provide reminders and follow-ups on discussed action items

• Send meeting invites, manage schedules, and update calendars to ensure all appointments and deadlines are met

• Proactively follow up with executives or supervisors and tea
mbers to ensure tasks are completed

• Maintain organized calendars, manage schedules, and coordinate appointments

• Answer
s on behalf of executives or supervisors, or assist with drafting, reviewing, and managing
 correspondence as directed

• Handle sensitive and confidential information with integrity

• Prioritize tasks, manage multiple assignments simultaneously, and meet deadlines

• Communicate effectively, both verbally and in writing, with executives or supervisors and colleagues

• Support executives or supervisors with project coordination, including planning, execution, and follow-up

• Collaborate with other departments to ensure smooth coordination of tasks and projects

• Utilize office software and collaboration tools such as Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Planner, Power Automate, Microsoft Office, Cisco IP Communicator, Google Workspace, and CRM systems to manage daily tasks and workflows

• Demonstrate flexibility and adaptability to changing priorities and business needs



Required Traits and Skills

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Clear and professional verbal and written communication

• Ability to prioritize effectively and meet deadlines

• Discretion and confidentiality when handling sensitive information

• Proactive mindset with the ability to anticipate needs

• Tech-savvy, with experience using collaboration and productivity tools and the ability to quickly learn new systems

• Dependable, reliable, and consistent

• Strong multitasking and problem-solving abilities

• Professional demeanor in all interactions

• Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams

• Critical thinking and sound decision-making skills

• Ethical integrity and professionalism

• Experience with basic project coordination and follow-ups

• Resilience and adaptability in a fast-paced environment



Preferred Qualifications

• 5+ years of experience as an Administrative Assistant

• Experience working remotely and using tools such as Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Planner, Power Automate, or similar platforms

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision



Schedule & Availability

• Sunday to Friday work schedule (50 hours)

• Day off: Saturday

• Primary hours: (US EST Time)

12:00 PM to 4:00 PM on Sunday (4 hours).

8:00 AM to 7:00 PM (10 hours, with a 1-hour lunch). from Monday to Thursday

8:00 AM to 3:00 PM (6 hours, with a 1-hour lunch) Friday



Pay: 10,000 to 40,000 PHP per month, depending on qualifications.





• Please apply only if you are willing and able to work this schedule and extended hours when requested



::Note::

Please send a link to your resume in Word or PDF format only, along with a voice recording explaining why you believe we should hire you, and your Speedtest result from Speedtest.net. Your application will be ignored if these requirements are not submitted.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter – Short-Term Rental (Airbnb Arbitrage)
description:
Here's the full post clean:



Job Title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter – Short-Term Rental (Airbnb Arbitrage)

Job Type: Part-Time or Full-Time | Flexible Hours | Remote

Pay: $5/hour



About the Role

We're a short-term rental company (Guestful Stays) that leases properties directly from landlords and lists them on Airbnb and VRBO. We're looking for a cold caller to contact landlords and property owners to find ones open to leasing their property to us for short-term rental use.

Your job is simple: call landlords, introduce the concept, qualify their interest, and set an appointment for our team to close the deal.



What You'll Do



Make outbound calls daily to landlords and property owners from a structured lead list

Follow a proven script to introduce our program and handle basic objections

Qualify leads based on property type and openness to short-term rental use

Set appointments or callbacks for our closing team

Log all call activity and outcomes in our CRM daily





Requirements (All Three Are Mandatory)



Experience cold calling landlords or property owners — this is non-negotiable

Background in real estate, property management, or the rental industry — non-negotiable

Exceptionally clear spoken and written English — non-negotiable



If you do not meet all three of the above, please do not apply.



You're Also a Great Fit If You:



Are comfortable with rejection and stay persistent

Can work independently without being micromanaged

Have a reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace





Nice to Have



Familiarity with Airbnb, VRBO, or short-term rentals

Experience with CRM tools (GoHighLevel, Airtable, Google Sheets, etc.)





To Apply

Record a 60-second voice or video intro addressing all three of the following:



Your experience cold calling landlords or property owners

Your background in real estate, property management, or rentals

Why your English communication skills make you the right fit



Applications without a recording will not be reviewed.

title: Outsourced Accounting Manager CPA
description:
We are hiring an experienced accountant to work with clients and staff to support our outsourced accounting clients.  Multi-client experience is a must.  This is a great opportunity to work with a growing professional services firm with family flexibility, remote work opportunities, and make a difference to our clients and team.  Our outsourced accounting team is expanding, and we are looking for results-driven manager who is easy to work with.  



SoCo is a growing outsourced accounting and tax firm with a wonderful team.  We achieve excellence by adhering to our company values and encouraging tea
mbers to own their projects and work.  Our values are rapid, responsive, accuracy, growing healthy businesses, and partnering with our clients.  



RESPONSIBILITIES

* Regular meetings with clients

* Oversee financial and accounting functions, including general ledger, accounts payable, accounts receivable, bank reconciliations, financing, and communicating with senior management for multiple clients

* Supervise accountants and other employees performing financial reporting, accounting, billing, collections, and budgeting duties.

* Sales tax reporting and compliance

* Payroll and year-end 1099 processing for clients

* Prepare financial reports: Reconcile Bank Statements; Prepare journal entries; Develop and maintain a month-end financial statement package

* Work with the partner or Executive Team to prepare and maintain budgets

* Policies & Procedures: Ensures that all financial policies and procedures are being followed; Implement new policies and procedures to help identify, resolve, and document accounting issues in addition to creating procedures to make the close and reporting processes more efficient and accurate

* Coordinate and direct the financial planning and budgeting activities of the organization including providing superior guidance in the allocation of future and current cash flow to ensure the best use of funds generated through detailed cost-benefit analysis

* Analyze the financial details of past, present, and expected operations to identify development opportunities and areas where improvement is needed

* Advise management on short-term and long-term financial objectives, policies, and actions which will include the development of financial plans to support the business as it moves through multiple phases of the business cycle

* Develop and monitor compliance with closing schedules and procedures

* Develop and document internal control policies, guidelines, and procedures for activities such as budget administration, cash and credit management, and accounting

* Document and monitor accounting policies and procedures

* Analyze financial statements for trends and document unusual variations in such trends.

* Provide direction and assistance to other organizational units regarding accounting and budgeting policies and procedures and efficient control and utilization of financial resources.

 * Maintain current knowledge of organizational policies and procedures, federal and state policies and directives, and current accounting standards.

* Strong communication skills and ability to interact with all levels of management, clients, and vendors

* CPA/CMA preferred

* Strong knowledge of Excel

* Attention to detail and accuracy

* Knowledge of confidential information policies, procedures, and regulations that governs employee and employer confidentiality

* Must work independently and as a member of a team

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Hello :-)



We’re a small, friendly Australian printing company specialising in real estate marketing materials — best known for our popular fridge magnet calendars.



We’re currently looking for a reliable and experienced Graphic Designer based in the Philippines who enjoys working from home and is seeking steady, ongoing work with a supportive team.



About You......



This role will suit someone who:



* Enjoys organised, structured design work

* Takes pride in producing neat, accurate files

* Works well independently without needing close supervision

* Prefers consistent weekly income over one-off projects

* Values flexibility and a healthy work–life balance



If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.



What You’ll Be Doing......



- Designing fridge magnet calendars (our core product)

- Creating business cards and other print materials

- Preparing print-ready artwork using Adobe Illustrator

- Following brand guidelines closely

- Setting up correct bleeds, margins, crop marks, and die-cuts

- Occasionally removing backgrounds from images



Most projects follow clear templates and style guides, so this role is ideal if you enjoy structured design work rather than constantly creating from scratch.



Skills & Experience......



+ Strong proficiency in Adobe Illustrator (essential)

+ Working knowledge of Adobe InDesign

+ Solid understanding of print production (CMYK, bleeds, crop marks, etc.)

+ Excellent attention to detail

+ Comfortable communicating in English

+ Work Style & Flexibility



This is a fully remote, work-from-home position.  Generally the hours will be Monday to Friday 7am to 3pm (with one hour off for lunch), but we can be a little flexible with these hours.



Our workload varies throughout the year, with busy periods (especially during calendar season August to December) and quieter times. During peak periods, we need someone dependable who can manage a higher volume of work. Outside of that, the pace is more relaxed.



We don’t micromanage — we trust our team to manage their time and deliver quality work.



Pay & Opportunity......



* Starting from PHP 7,000 per week

* Performance review after 3 months

* Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

* Substantial Bonuses available for 4 months a year (Aug to Nov)

* Christmas 2 week bonus

* 3 weeks paid holiday each January

* paid sick leave

* We’re looking for someone who values stability and wants to grow with us over time.



How to Apply......



Please send:



* Your resume

* A short introduction about yourself and your experience

* 3–5 samples of print-ready work created in Illustrator

* A brief explanation of your experience preparing files for professional printing



Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a small paid sample task.



We value reliability, kindness, and clear communication. If you’re looking for consistent remote work with a respectful and supportive team, we’d love to hear from you.



Thank you, we hope to chat with you soon! ????

title: Facebook Ads Specialist ( Meta, FB, IG Ads )
description:
Facebook Ads Specialist (Digital Products & Education O?ers)

I am looking for a skilled
 Ads Specialist who has real experience scaling digital

education products, online courses, and info products.

This role is for someone who understands how to grow a digital o?er using Meta ads and can take

an existing profitable funnel and help scale it to consistent daily revenue.



About the Business -

My  brand operates in the beauty education space, selling digital tutorials and online

masterclasses for hairstylists and aspiring beauty entrepreneurs.

We currently run Meta ads for a digital product priced around $67 and generate consistent sales

each month. However, we are looking for someone who can help optimise and scale the account

further.



Our goal is to reach $700+ per day in consistent revenue from ads, and eventually scale beyond that.



Current Performance:

• Digital o?er price: $67

• Current CPA: approximately £18–£22 per purchase

• Current monthly revenue from ads: ~$7K+

• Current ad spend: ~£130/day / $172 ( I think this is extremely high for the results currently being

generated)

• Shopify store with conversion rate around 1.7%

I strongly believe there are opportunities to optimise the ads, creatives, and strategy to increase

daily sales.



Responsibilities:

• Audit our existing Meta Ads account and identify optimisation opportunities

• Develop a clear strategy to scale the account to higher daily sales

• Test and launch new ad creatives regularly

• Monitor campaign performance and optimise CPA

• Scale winning ad sets and creatives

• Manage retargeting campaigns for website visitors and abandoned carts

• Provide weekly performance reports and insights

• Work closely with our team to test new angles, hooks, and creatives



Communication & Reporting Expectations

Because we run paid tra?c daily, communication and responsiveness are extremely important.



We expect:

• Consistent monitoring of active campaigns

• Quick responses during working hours

• Weekly performance reports with insights and recommendations

• Proactive communication when performance changes

• Clear updates when new tests or adjustments are made

This role requires someone who takes ownership of results and communicates consistently.



We are not looking for someone who simply turns ads on and o?.

We are looking for someone who can:



• Identify opportunities to scale campaigns

• Suggest new creative angles to test

• Analyse performance data and adjust strategy

• Proactively recommend improvements to our funnel and ads

You should feel confident taking initiative and guiding the advertising strategy.

Requirements

• Proven experience running
/Instagram ads for digital products or online courses

• Strong understanding of CPA optimisation and scaling strategies

• Experience with Shopify tracking and pixel setup

• Ability to analyse data and make strategic decisions

• Good communication and ability to provide clear reports



Bonus Experience

• Experience with digital education businesses

• Experience scaling low-ticket o?ers ($27–$197)

• Experience running successful retargeting campaigns

• Experience improving conversion rates for paid tra?c funnels



To Apply Please include:

1. Your portfolio and Examples of digital products or online courses you have scaled with

 ads

2. Average CPA or ROAS achieved

3. The highest daily revenue you have helped generate with ads

4. What you would optimise first in a funnel converting at around 1.7%.

If a digital product funnel converts at 1.7% and has a cost per purchase of £18–£22, what

are the first three things you would test to improve performance and lower CPA for better

ROAS?



I am looking for someone long-term who can help take this ad account to the next level.



Thanks, Jaylah.

title: YouTube Project Manager / Producer
description:
Role Overview: I am looking for a results-oriented YouTube Project Manager to take over the production management of my channel. I follow a strict
workflow: I provide the vision, script, and voiceover (first 10%), you manage the entire production process (80%), and I return for final approval and publishing (last 10%).



Your mission is to ensure that two 15-18 minute videos are produced every week with impeccable quality, without me needing to micro-manage the process.



Your Responsibilities:

Freelance Management: Supervise our video editors on Upwork. Ensure they meet deadlines and maintain our "sourcing" standards for B-roll and stock footage.

Quality Control (QC): Perform deep-dive reviews of V1 and V2 edits. You must have an "eagle eye" for pacing, storytelling flow, audio clarity, and visual relevance.

Thumbnail Direction: You will be responsible for hiring and managing a dedicated Thumbnail Designer from the Philippines. You will brief them on high-CTR concepts and select the best variations.

Workflow Organization: Maintain our production pipeline in Notion and use Nexlev to monitor competition and performance trends.



Requirements:

Proven experience in YouTube channel management or video production coordination.

High proficiency with Notion.

Strong critical thinking: You don't just "watch" a video; you analyze why a viewer might click away.

Excellent communication skills: You know how to give firm but constructive feedback to editors.



How to Apply (The Test):

Start your application with the word "ORANGE".

Briefly describe your experience managing remote video editors.

Critical Thinking Test: Please analyze this video [Insert your link here] and give me 3 specific suggestions to improve either the editing rhythm or the thumbnail for better performance.

title: Account Manager/Support - Join the 'Disney' of Short-Stays
description:
We’re building what many would describe as the “Disney of the short-stay industry”, where every detail matters, every experience is intentional, and everything operates at a higher standard.



This role sits at the centre of it all.



You’ll be working directly across clients, operations, and internal systems, ensuring everything runs smoothly behind the scenes while delivering a level of service that most companies don’t even attempt.



If you’re someone who thrives in fast-moving environments and takes pride in getting things right, you’ll fit here.



What You’ll Be Doing:



1. Managing day-to-day communication with clients

2. Handling requests, questions, and problem-solving

3. Coordinating schedules, bookings, and operational tasks

4. Supporting internal operations across multiple systems

5. Keeping data, trackers, and systems accurate and up to date

6. Assisting with issue resolution, claims, and general support

7. Communicating with external partners when required

8. Creating and improving internal processes and documentation

9. Helping onboard clients and tea
mbers

10. Making sure nothing slips through the cracks



What Makes This Role Different:



1. You won’t be doing repetitive, low-level support work

2. You’ll be trusted to think, d
, and act

3. You’ll sit across multiple parts of the business, not just one function

4. You’ll be part of building a brand that is redefining its category



This is for someone who wants to be in the engine room of a company that’s scaling fast, not just watching from the sidelines.



What We’re Looking For:



1. Extremely organised and detail-oriented

2. Fast responder and clear communicator

3. Strong problem-solving ability

4. Able to work independently without constant direction

5. Comfortable using multiple tools and systems

6. Reliable, proactive, and accountable

7. Able to handle pressure and multiple tasks at once

8. Perfect Ability to Write, Speak and Read English



This Role Is NOT For You If:



1. You need constant supervision

2. You struggle to stay organised

3. You avoid responsibility or decision-making

4. You’re slow to respond or follow up



Video Application (Required)



All applicants must submit a short video answering:



1. Who you are and how you present yourself

2. Your experience in hospitality or short-term stays (if any)

3. What being a brand ambassador means to you

4. If you were told you were joining the Disney of the short-stay industry, how would that change the way you approach your work?

title: Technical Marketing Assistant (SEO, GA4, Tracking, Automations)
description:
About The Role



We are building a growth ecosystem that combines marketing intelligence, operational systems and scalable digital infrastructure for small businesses.



This is not a basic VA role.



You will work directly with the founder to execute, optimise and strengthen digital marketing systems across both client accounts and internal brand projects.



Initially, you will focus on execution. Over time, you will be expected to refine systems, identify improvements and operate with increasing independence.

~ Execution



• Set up and optimise Meta ad campaigns

• Implement and troubleshoot tracking including GA4 and Meta Pixel

• Build and test funnels

• Implement SEO improvements

• Manage CRM and
 campaign execution

~Optimisation

Bonus Experience



• ManyChat

• Dripify



What Success Looks Like



Within 90 days you:

Who This Role Is For

Working Style

title: Customer Support Rep
description:
We are looking for multiple experienced Customer Support Representatives to join a fast-growing supplement and subscription eCommerce brand. You will manage 100+ daily outbound communications while maintaining warm, personal responses across
, chat, and social channels. This is not an entry-level role; it is for someone confident in their ability to move fast without sacrificing quality. To confirm you have read this far, include the code CS-START at the top of your application.



Key Responsibilities:



Maintain a minimum of 100 outbound communications daily across
, chat, and social comments with zero loss of brand voice or personalisation. Meet First Response Time targets of under 2 hours across all channels without exception. Own ticket resolution end-to-end by diagnosing, resolving, and following up with every customer. Respond to customer inquiries via
, Commslayer, Instagram,
, Reddit, and direct messages. Identify at-risk customers showing churn signals such as complaints, cancellations, or disappointment and flag them for retention outreach. Monitor and respond to community mentions, reviews, and Reddit threads in relevant supplement and health niches. Audit and manage review platform responses with empathy, including public replies and removal flagging where appropriate. Report daily metrics including tickets handled, first response time, resolution rate, CSAT scores, and churn signals. Continuously improve documentation, SOPs, and internal processes based on recurring customer issues.



Essential Requirements



Proven high-volume customer support experience handling 100 or more tickets and outbound messages per day in an eCommerce environment — you must be able to demonstrate this with specific numbers. A minimum of 2 years in eCommerce customer support, with preference given to experience in supplements, nutrition, wellness, or comparable high-review subscription brands. Proficiency with helpdesk software such as Commslayer, Gorgias, Zendesk, Intercom, or similar platforms. Comfortable working with Shopify, basic data tracking, and submitting daily performance reports. Strong written communication that is clear, warm, professional, and on-brand. Ability to manage multiple channels and competing priorities simultaneously. Time zone overlap with the UK of at least 5 hours.



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with Commslayer is a bonus. Review platform management, including flagging experience. Community management or Reddit engagement experience. Knowledge of supplements, nutrition, or functional wellness. Experience writing for social platforms with an understanding of community and viral dynamics. To confirm you have read the responsibilities and requirements in full, include the code REP-100X somewhere in your application response.



This is a remote telecommuting role in accordance with the Philippine Telecommuting Act (RA 11165). The base rate is USD $3.00 per hour. Performance bonuses of between $10 and $50 per month are available based on key metrics, including speed, resolution quality, and consistency. Working hours are 6 hours per day across Day, Swing, or Night shift - clearly state if you want a specific DAY - SWING OR NIGHT shift - or we will arrange this for you during the onboarding process.



You will be asked to answer 5 to 6 scenario-based questions assessing your real-world high-volume support experience, speed, problem-solving ability, and brand voice fit. These are practical situations you will face daily in this role. To show you have read this job description in its entirety, end your application with the code SHIFT-PH-6. Applications missing all three codes — CS-START, REP-100X, and SHIFT-PH-6 — will not be reviewed.

Q: WHY SHOULD WE HIRE YOU FOR THIS JOB, AND WHAT IS YOUR RELEVANT EXPERIENCE?

Filter opportunities based on:



NAICS codes (e.g., 238320, construction-related)



Set-asides (EDWOSB, SDVOSB, Small Business)



Location and eligibility requirements



Deliver a curated list of qualified opportunities daily/weekly



2. Bid/No-Bid Analysis



Evaluate opportunities and recommend whether to pursue



Identify:



Competition level



Scope alignment



Risk factors



Provide short summaries and recommendations



3. Capability Statement Development



Create and update professional capability statements



Tailor capability statements to specific opportunities



Highlight differentiators, certifications, and past performance



4. Proposal Support



Assist in drafting proposal sections (technical approach, past performance, etc.)



Organize documents and ensure compliance with RFP requirements



Help track deadlines, submissions, and amendments



5. Market & Competitor Research



Identify companies winning similar contracts



Research potential teaming partners (SDVOSB, WOSB, GCs)



Support outreach preparation



Required Skills & Experience



Experience with 
 (Contract Opportunities)



Understanding of federal contracting terminology



Experience writing or supporting government proposals



Strong writing and communication skills



Ability to analyze RFPs and summarize key requirements



Familiarity with NAICS codes and set-asides (WOSB, SDVOSB, etc.)



Preferred (Highly Valued)



Experience in construction or facilities-related contracts



Experience creating winning capability statements



Knowledge of FAR / federal procurement basics



Experience with GovWin, USASpending, or similar tools



What Success Looks Like



Consistently delivering qualified, winnable opportunities



Supporting proposals that lead to shortlists and wins



Helping position LP Construction Group as a competitive federal contractor

title: Virtual Human Resource Officer
description:
Job Title: Virtual Human Resource Officer



Company: Gizmos & Gadgets Group of Companies

Location: Remote / Virtual

Employment Type: Full-Time (Remote)



?



About Us



Gizmos & Gadgets Group of Companies is a fast-growing, experience-driven retail organization focused on innovative technology, beauty, and lifestyle solutions. We are committed to building high-performing teams that deliver exceptional customer experiences across all our brands, including Glamour Beauty.



?



Job Summary



We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Human Resource Officer to manage and support all HR functions remotely. This role is critical in ensuring efficient recruitment, employee engagement, compliance, and HR system management across our growing organization.



?



Key Responsibilities



1. Recruitment & Talent Management

 • Manage end-to-end recruitment (job postings, screening, interviews, onboarding)

 • Coordinate hiring across retail, beauty, and corporate departments

 • Maintain a pipeline of qualified candidates for future roles



2. Employee Relations & Engagement

 • Act as the first point of contact for employee HR matters

 • Develop and implement employee engagement initiatives

 • Support performance management processes and staff evaluations



3. HR Operations & Administration

 • Maintain employee records and HR documentation digitally

 • Ensure compliance with company policies and labor regulations

 • Develop and update HR policies and SOPs



4. Training & Development

 • Coordinate onboarding and training programs

 • Identify skills gaps and recommend development initiatives

 • Support leadership in building high-performing teams



5. HR Systems & Digital Transformation

 • Manage HR software and digital tools

 • Assist in implementing HR automation and virtual systems

 • Generate HR reports and analytics for management



?



Requirements

 • Proven experience in Human Resources (2+ years preferred)

 • Experience working remotely or managing distributed teams

 • Strong knowledge of recruitment, labor laws, and HR best practices

 • Excellent communication and organizational skills

 • Proficiency in HR software, Google Workspace, and Microsoft Office

 • Ability to handle confidential information with discretion



?



Preferred Qualifications

 • Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field

 • Experience in retail or fast-paced environments

 • Familiarity with CRM and workforce management systems



?



Key Skills

 • Strong interpersonal and communication skills

 • Problem-solving and conflict resolution

 • Time management and multitasking

 • Attention to detail

 • Tech-savvy and adaptable



?



What We Offer

 • Fully remote working environment

 • Opportunity to grow within a dynamic organization

 • Exposure to multiple business sectors (electronics, beauty, retail)

 • Performance-based incentives



?



How to Apply



Submit your application including:

 • Updated Resume

 • Cover Letter

 • Expected Salary

 • Availability (Full-time / Part-time)

description:

Pay

 subject line to:

title: Graphic Designer — Styleframes & Illustration
description:
Company: ContentGrow

Location: Remote (Eastern Timezone)

Hours: Freelance, variable hours ($6/hr) — with the opportunity to move into full-time hours



About ContentGrow

ContentGrow is a creative studio specializing in Web3, AI, tech, SaaS, and gaming. We produce motion graphics videos — explainers, promos, product walkthroughs, brand stories — alongside graphics, illustrations, and marketing assets for clients across fast-paced industries. We blend creativity, on-time delivery, and a full-stack design approach to deliver work that actually moves the needle for the brands we partner with.



Our Mission? To give every company the 'digital gravity' that pulls in their ideal user.



Why Join ContentGrow?

• Be a part of a wide variety of projects, offering new challenges, creative opportunities & keeping your work stimulating.

• Take on clearly defined projects while having a direct say in design decisions that impact brand direction.

• Opportunity to develop into a design lead role, guiding creative direction and mentoring future tea
mbers.

• Hone your design expertise and expand your skillset in a fast paced work environment.

• Potential for performance bonuses and possible revenue pool share.



The Role

We're looking for a Styleframe Designer — someone who can take a storyboard and define the visual direction of a 2D motion graphics video through polished, production-ready styleframes. This is a design and illustration role, not a motion role. You'll establish the look, feel, color, composition, and illustration style across frames that our motion designers then bring to life. Illustration ability is a must — many of our projects require custom illustrated elements (characters, environments, icons, scene compositions) that go beyond stock assets and template work.



What You'll Work On

• 2D video styleframes and storyboards for motion graphics projects (explainers, promos, brand videos, etc.)

• Social Media Graphics (images, ads, etc.)

• Brand Kits & Logos

• Presentations & Pitch Decks

• One-Pagers & Infographics

• Blog Images & Covers

• Video Thumbnails & Event Banners

• Landing Page Designs & Moodboards

• Website UI Components & Iconography

• Marketing Materials & Portfolio Posts

…and more as our brand and client needs evolve



Key Responsibilities

• Design Production

- Design 2D styleframes that set visual direction for motion graphics videos (explainers, promos, brand videos, etc.).

- Illustrate custom scenes, characters, environments, and graphic elements as needed per project.

- Interpret storyboards and creative briefs to develop frames that are on-brand and production-ready for motion.

- Develop supporting visuals for both client projects and our internal brands.

- Maintain structured file management and naming conventions for organized collaboration.



• Project & Workflow Management

- Manage your production queue of tasks, delivering on time or communicating proactively if delays arise.

- Juggle multiple projects simultaneously without compromising on quality.



• Collaboration & Communication

- Collaborate with our motion designers so your styleframes translate cleanly into animation.

- Collaborate with our strategic internal team to understand creative briefings, goals, and visual direction.

- Offer expert design insights to elevate each project's creative output.

- Remain available on
 during your working hours, responding within 10 minutes.



• Feedback & Continuous Improvement

- Embrace constructive feedback and perform revisions to meet or exceed quality standards.

- Commit to always learning and refining design techniques, staying updated on industry developments.



• Reporting & Process Adherence

- Log daily task progress (time spent, status updates, etc.).

- Provide concise end-of-day updates to the team.

- Uphold our internal processes and suggest improvements as the company grows.



Qualifications

• 2-3 years of experience in graphic design with a focus on styleframe design for motion graphics.

• Strong illustration skills — you can draw and design original scenes, not just arrange pre-made elements.

• Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Figma.

• Strong understanding of design fundamentals (typography, layout, color theory, composition).

• Proven experience crafting brand and marketing assets.

• Good verbal and excellent written communication skills in English.

• Self-motivated high agency person with a commitment to excellence that takes pride in their work.

• Required: 2D styleframe design experience for motion graphics videos (explainers, promos, etc.).

• Required: Illustration ability — custom characters, scenes, environments, or graphic elements.

• Bonus: Motion Graphics or Animation experience.

• Bonus: Web design experience (responsive layouts, UI components, site mockups).

• Bonus: Product design experience (interface design, user flows, prototyping).

• Bonus: Familiarity with Web3, AI, SaaS, or other emerging industries.



Portfolio Requirement

Your portfolio must include styleframes you've designed for motion graphics projects. Applications without styleframe examples will not be considered.



Values

• Accountability: Take ownership of your work and follow through on deadlines.

• Impactful: Create designs that drive real results and leave a lasting impression.

• Innovator: Push boundaries with creative ideas and fresh design approaches.

• Attention to detail: Every design decision, from spacing to typography, is intentional.

• Communicative: Stay responsive, give and receive constructive feedback, and communicate with clarity.



Interview Process (If selected)

1. Complete a short online skill test

2. Complete a simple creative test task (including styleframe creation)

3. Interview with the founders



How to Apply

Send your portfolio, resume, and a brief message about why you'd be a great fit. Your portfolio must include styleframes you've designed for motion graphics projects — this is required to be considered. Beyond styleframes, include work that shows your range: illustration, branding, social media graphics, web designs, or anything else that demonstrates your skillset.

title: Generative AI Trainer
description:
We’re hiring a Generative AI Trainer to join our early-stage startup that's using artificial intelligence to help healthcare companies better understand and manage their contracts. This is a great opportunity to get into the world of AI while working closely with a team that values ownership, creative problem-solving, and building something from the ground up.



In this role, you’ll focus on analyzing and processing complex documentation and contracts, working hand-in-hand with our operations and product teams to ensure our AI models are learning and improving every day. It’s a detail-heavy, highly organized role—perfect for someone who loves working with documentation, thrives in a structured environment, and enjoys being part of a fast-moving startup.



This is an internal, non-voice operations role, ideal for someone who prefers deep focus work and collaboration through written communication.



If you’re passionate about startups, tech, and staying organized, and you get a thrill out of seeing things work better because of your input, this one’s for you.



Responsibilities:

- Analyze, review, and process healthcare contracts and documents using internal tools powered by AI models.

- Develop systems and workflows to improve how contracts are handled, stored, and made accessible to customers.

- Ensure data accuracy, organization, and consistency across tools and platforms used by the AI and operations teams.

- Collaborate daily with operations and product teams to evaluate AI output and provide feedback for ongoing model  improvements.

- Act as a thought partner to help shape how the AI is fine-tuned and trained over time.

- Continuously develop your skills and understanding of both the AI model and the product, contributing to its evolution as the company scales.



Requirements:

- 5+ years of experience in BPO Customer Support, Operations, or Documentation Management, especially with US-based businesses.

- Any US-based healthcare experience (familiarity with medical or insurance terminology, systems, tools, or processes) is a really big plus!

- Experience working at a US-based startup is a major plus!

- 2+ years working from home with consistent productivity and communication.

- Experience as a Team Lead or Subject Matter Expert is a plus.

- Typing speed of 75 WPM or higher preferred.

- Regular user of AI tools (ChatGPT, Notion AI, etc.) with curiosity about how they work and improve.

- Extremely detail-oriented with an almost obsessive knack for organizing documents, workflows, and data.

- Naturally inquisitive and comfortable asking lots of questions to understand how things work.

- Fast learner who takes feedback well and enjoys iterating toward improvement.

- Strong written communication and collaboration skills—most of your work will be async or via chat.

- Proficient in English and confident navigating various SaaS tools in a remote, fast-paced setting.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 55k PHP per month.

- Paid Time Off + Paid Holidays.

- 100% WFH.

- Flexible work arrangements and supportive team environment.



When applying, please attach your CV and please tell us about your favorite AI tools and how you’ve used AI in a past role. Also, copy and paste this Job ID: rec8LYyhS9JRHsFJh into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job rec8LYyhS9JRHsFJh!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!

title: Sales Dev Rep - Full Time (Base + Uncapped Commission)
description:
We are looking for a relentless, articulate, and strategic sales professional to join our team. We specialize in Temporary Wall Systems—providing modular, airtight, and professional containment solutions for construction sites, hospitals, and commercial renovations.



This isn’t a "volume-only" sweatshop role. We value quality over quantity. You will be targeting high-value decision-makers and setting appointments that lead to five-figure contracts.



What’s In It For You?

• Strong Base Pay: We believe in paying pros what they are worth.

• Highly Incentivized: Aggressive commission structure for every qualified meeting set and every closed deal.

• Niche Market: You are selling a solution that GCs need for safety and dust compliance—it’s a problem-solver, not a luxury.

• Warm Leads: We provide the lists and the CRM; you provide the charm and the closing skills.

• Career Development: The successful candidate will grow in this position to become an account executive and lead all project sourcing activities in a full-time salary role with benefits and bonus structure.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Outbound Prospecting: Conduct targeted cold calls to General Contractors, Project Managers, and Facility Directors.

• Lead Qualification: Identify upcoming renovation projects in ConstructConnect and Hubspot and determine if our modular systems are a fit.

• Appointment Setting: Schedule high-quality walkthroughs or discovery calls for our sales engineers.

• CRM Management: Keep our pipeline clean and updated in Excel and Hubspot.

• Follow-up: Be the "persistent professional" who stays on a lead's radar without being a nuisance.

________________________________________

The Ideal Candidate

• Construction Industry Fluency: You know what a "GC" is, you understand the pressure of construction timelines, and you aren't intimidated by the industry.

• Exceptional English: Native-level fluency with a neutral or professional accent is required.

• The "Hunter" Mentality: You don't get discouraged by "No." You see it as a data point on the way to a "Yes."

• Tech Savvy: Comfortable with VOIP software, CRM tools, and LinkedIn Research.

________________________________________

How to Apply

1. Tell us about your most successful cold calling campaign.

2. Do you have experience in construction or other relevant industry?

3. Please respond to job description with the keyword “cold” in the title and add the word “cold” to the title of your resume.

4. Important: Please attach a 30-60 second voice recording or a link to a video of you introducing yourself. We want to hear your phone presence!

title: Remote Fencing Take-offs, and Estimator
description:
Job Summary:



We are seeking a detail-oriented Remote Fencing Take-offs, and Estimator professional to support the estimating and bidding process by researching current bid opportunities, preparing accurate take-offs, and assisting with the development and submission of estimates. This role involves reviewing drawings and bid documents to define project scope, analyzing material, labor, and equipment requirements, and organizing bid packages for submission through various platforms. The position requires strong technical aptitude, attention to detail, and consistent follow-up on submitted bids. The ideal candidate has experience in construction estimating, preferably within fencing, along with familiarity with bidding platforms, job management software, and the ability to support additional administrative tasks as needed.



Key Responsibilities:



Research and track current bids through online platforms.

Prepare take-offs and document key details for the office to generate estimates.

Progress toward independently preparing and submitting estimates.

Consistently follow up on all submitted bids to track status and outcomes.

Review drawings, specifications, and bid documents to define project scope and requirements.

Analyze material, labor, and equipment quantities to ensure accurate pricing.

Prepare and organize bid packages and supporting documentation for submission.

Support additional administrative related tasks as assigned.

Qualifications & Requirements:



Strong English communication skills (written and spoken).

Excellent interpersonal and collaboration skills.

Experience with take-offs, estimating, and bidding.

Technically inclined and detail-oriented.

Experience in construction, preferably fencing.

Experience in estimating and bidding platforms (e.g., PlanHub, ConstructConnect).

Tech-savvy; experience with government contracts is a plus.

Experience with Joober highly preferred.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets), preferred.

Sound judgment and ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Reliable computer (Windows 10 or newer), two monitors, and stable high-speed internet.?

Compensation & Benefits:



100% remote work.

Compensation in USD.

Full-time position with 40 hours weekly.

Great work environment with potential for growth.

title: VA Independent Insurance Agency
description:
JOB OPPORTUNITY

Virtual Insurance Assistant

Independent Insurance Agency  |  Remote Position  |  $600/month USD

Full-Time  |  Annual Raises  |  Bonus Potential

Position Overview

We are a growing independent insurance agency seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Virtual Insurance Assistant to serve as the face of our agency. This remote position is ideal for a self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced environment and takes pride in delivering exceptional customer service. You will be the primary point of contact for our clients and prospects, handling everything from inbound calls to policy servicing, quoting, and pipeline management.

Compensation & Benefits

• Starting pay: $600 USD per month

• Annual performance-based raises

• Bonus potential based on performance and agency growth

• Fully remote / virtual work environment

Key Responsibilities

Client Services & Communication

• Answer and manage inbound client and prospect phone calls professionally

• Serve as the primary point of contact and face of the agency for all client interactions

• Service existing personal and commercial lines policyholders with professionalism and accuracy

• Work directly with mortgagees and lienholders to fulfill insurance verification requests



Quoting & Sales Support

• Quote personal and commercial lines for both existing clients and new prospects

• Utilize PL Rater and EzLynx to generate competitive quotes accurately and efficiently

• Follow up on quotes and assist prospects through the application and binding process



Agency Management & CRM

• Manage and maintain the agency management system (
ntum AMP) with up-to-date client records

• Utilize the agency CRM to log service requests, manage client communications, and track follow-ups

• Manage renewal pipelines for personal and commercial lines customers to ensure timely policy reviews

• Complete and process ACORD forms including ACORD 25, 125, 126, and 140 accurately and on time



Organization & Productivity

• Multitask effectively across phone calls,
s, quoting, and data entry simultaneously

• Prioritize workload to ensure all service requests and deadlines are met

• Maintain organized workflows and documentation standards within all agency systems

Required Skills & Qualifications

• Prior experience in insurance or a related financial services field strongly preferred

• Familiarity with personal and commercial lines insurance products

• Experience with PL Rater, EzLynx, or 
ntum AMP is a plus

• Strong knowledge of ACORD forms (25, 125, 126, 140)

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English

• Proficient with CRM platforms and pipeline management

• Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple priorities at once

• Strong attention to detail and commitment to accuracy

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a professional, distraction-free work environment

• Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and take ownership of responsibilities

Technology & Systems Used

• Agency Management System: 
ntum AMP

• Comparative Rating Platforms: PL Rater, EzLynx

• CRM Platform: Used for service requests, renewal tracking, and pipeline management

• ACORD Forms: 25 (Certificate of Liability), 125 (Commercial Lines Application), 126 (Commercial General Liability), 140 (Property)

About the Ideal Candidate

You are someone who genuinely enjoys helping people, takes pride in your work, and understands that in the insurance industry, accuracy and responsiveness matter. You communicate clearly, stay cool under pressure, and know how to juggle competing priorities without dropping the ball. Whether you are handling a billing question, issuing a certificate, or walking a prospect through a quote, you bring the same level of care and professionalism to every interaction.



This is a remote role, so you must be disciplined, proactive, and comfortable working independently while staying closely connected with agency leadership.

To apply, please submit your resume and a brief introduction outlining your insurance experience and disc assessment. Click this link.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Marketing Manager

Immigration Support Services (ISS)



Full-Time | Remote | Independent Contractor



Independent Contractor Notice

This is a full-time independent contractor position, not an employee position.

The selected candidate will operate as an independent contractor and will be responsible for managing their own taxes, compliance obligations, and business registrations as required by their jurisdiction.

No employer-employee relationship is intended or created by this engagement.



About Immigration Support Services (ISS)

Immigration Support Services (ISS) is a U.S.-based company that provides non-legal immigration support services, including business plan preparation, entity formation support, franchise opportunity sourcing, and related services for individuals pursuing U.S. immigration benefits.

We work alongside immigration attorneys and law firms across the United States and internationally to support individuals navigating the immigration process.

We are seeking a highly capable Marketing Manager to oversee and execute the company’s marketing efforts and drive measurable growth.



Position Overview

The Marketing Manager will be responsible for managing and optimizing ISS’s marketing systems, lead generation funnels, and performance tracking.

title: VA Independent Insurance Agency
description:
JOB OPPORTUNITY

Virtual Insurance Assistant

Independent Insurance Agency  |  Remote Position  |  $600/month USD

Full-Time  |  Annual Raises  |  Bonus Potential



Position Overview

We are a growing independent insurance agency seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Virtual Insurance Assistant to serve as the face of our agency. This remote position is ideal for a self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced environment and takes pride in delivering exceptional customer service. You will be the primary point of contact for our clients and prospects, handling everything from inbound calls to policy servicing, quoting, and pipeline management.

Compensation & Benefits

• Starting pay: $600 USD per month

• Annual performance-based raises

• Bonus potential based on performance and agency growth

• Fully remote / virtual work environment



Key Responsibilities

Client Services & Communication

• Answer and manage inbound client and prospect phone calls professionally

• Serve as the primary point of contact and face of the agency for all client interactions

• Service existing personal and commercial lines policyholders with professionalism and accuracy

• Work directly with mortgagees and lienholders to fulfill insurance verification requests



Quoting & Sales Support

• Quote personal and commercial lines for both existing clients and new prospects

• Utilize PL Rater and EzLynx to generate competitive quotes accurately and efficiently

• Follow up on quotes and assist prospects through the application and binding process



Agency Management & CRM

• Manage and maintain the agency management system (
ntum AMP) with up-to-date client records

• Utilize the agency CRM to log service requests, manage client communications, and track follow-ups

• Manage renewal pipelines for personal and commercial lines customers to ensure timely policy reviews

• Complete and process ACORD forms including ACORD 25, 125, 126, and 140 accurately and on time



Organization & Productivity

• Multitask effectively across phone calls,
s, quoting, and data entry simultaneously

• Prioritize workload to ensure all service requests and deadlines are met

• Maintain organized workflows and documentation standards within all agency systems



Required Skills & Qualifications

• Prior experience in insurance or a related financial services field strongly preferred

• Familiarity with personal and commercial lines insurance products

• Experience with PL Rater, EzLynx, or 
ntum AMP is a plus

• Strong knowledge of ACORD forms (25, 125, 126, 140)

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English

• Proficient with CRM platforms and pipeline management

• Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple priorities at once

• Strong attention to detail and commitment to accuracy

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a professional, distraction-free work environment

• Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and take ownership of responsibilities



Technology & Systems Used

• Agency Management System: 
ntum AMP

• Comparative Rating Platforms: PL Rater, EzLynx

• CRM Platform: Used for service requests, renewal tracking, and pipeline management

• ACORD Forms: 25 (Certificate of Liability), 125 (Commercial Lines Application), 126 (Commercial General Liability), 140 (Property)

About the Ideal Candidate

You are someone who genuinely enjoys helping people, takes pride in your work, and understands that in the insurance industry, accuracy and responsiveness matter. You communicate clearly, stay cool under pressure, and know how to juggle competing priorities without dropping the ball. Whether you are handling a billing question, issuing a certificate, or walking a prospect through a quote, you bring the same level of care and professionalism to every interaction.



This is a remote role, so you must be disciplined, proactive, and comfortable working independently while staying closely connected with agency leadership.

To apply, please submit your resume and a brief introduction outlining your insurance experience and the disc results to my
 address. Click link for disc exam.

title: Social Media Assistant (Remote – Philippines Based)
description:

Role Overview

Key Responsibilities



• Schedule and publish content across Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube

• Perform basic video editing (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

• Create simple graphics using Canva or similar tools

• Add captions, subtitles, and hooks to videos

• Organise content and maintain posting calendar

• Assist in repurposing content across platforms

• Ensure consistency in branding and messaging



Requirements



• Based in the Philippines

• Minimum 16GB RAM laptop/desktop (MANDATORY)

• Fast and stable internet connection (minimum 50 Mbps preferred)

• Prior experience in social media management



Technical Skills Required:

• Video editing using CapCut, Captions AI, or similar tools
