title: AI Engineer (Automotive & Safety Systems)
description:
About the Role



We are seeking a highly capable AI Engineer based in the Philippines to design and build intelligent systems for the automotive industry. This role focuses on developing AI solutions that can assess vehicle risk, diagnose faults, and assist in generating accurate repair quotes and timelines.



In addition, you will help develop AI-powered tools that support health and safety processes, including generating and assisting with documentation such as risk assessments, policies, and safe systems of work.



This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys solving real-world problems and building practical AI solutions that directly impact business operations.



Key Responsibilities



Automotive AI Systems



- Develop and deploy AI/ML models for:



  * Vehicle fault diagnosis

  * Risk assessment (e.g., likelihood of failure, repair urgency)

  * Automated quote generation (parts, labor, timelines)

* Work with structured and unstructured data (vehicle data, repair logs, images, etc.)

* Build intelligent workflows that integrate AI into business processes

* Fine-tune and optimize models for accuracy and performance

* Collaborate with stakeholders to translate automotive requirements into AI solutions

* Continuously improve models based on real-world usage and feedback



Health & Safety AI Systems



Develop AI tools to assist in creating and maintaining:



  * Risk Assessments (RAMS)

  * Health & Safety policies

  * Safe Systems of Work (SSOW)

* Design systems that analyze job data and identify potential hazards and risks

* Generate structured, compliant safety documentation based on job type and environment

* Ensure outputs align with relevant safety standards (training/support provided if needed)

* Continuously improve accuracy and relevance of safety recommendations



General



* Document systems, models, and processes clearly

* Ensure solutions are scalable, maintainable, and reliable





Required Skills & Experience



* Strong experience with Python and AI/ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar)

* Experience working with APIs and integrating AI into applications

* Solid understanding of data processing, model training, and evaluation

* Familiarity with LLMs (e.g., OpenAI or open-source models) and prompt engineering

* Ability to work independently and communicate clearly in English

* Strong problem-solving mindset with a focus on practical solutions



Preferred (Nice-to-Have)



* Experience in the automotive industry or working with mechanical/diagnostic data

* Experience with computer vision (e.g., vehicle diagnostics using images)

* Experience building estimation, quoting, or decision-support systems

* Experience with AI-driven document generation or structured outputs

* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

* Understanding of compliance, health & safety, or risk assessment frameworks



Key Outcomes / What Success Looks Like



* AI system that can accurately identify likely vehicle faults

* Reliable risk scoring for repairs and vehicle conditions

* Automated generation of quotes with realistic pricing and timelines

* AI-assisted safety documents that are clear, structured, and usable in real operations

* Reduction in manual time spent on diagnostics, quoting, and safety documentation

* Scalable and maintainable AI infrastructure



Salary & Benefits



* Competitive salary (based on experience)

* Long-term, stable role

* Flexible remote work environment

* Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI applications in a real industry



How to Apply

Please include:



1. A brief introduction about yourself

2. Examples of AI/ML projects you’ve built (links required — applications without work samples will NOT be considered)

3. Your experience with real-world AI applications (not just theory)

4. Your expected monthly salary (in USD or PHP)

5. Confirmation that this will be your only contract and that you are available for a full-time, long-term role



Important



* Applications without project samples/work examples will be automatically rejected

* You must clearly confirm this is your only contract and you are committed to a full-time, long-term position

* Include the phrase: “AI Auto Pro” in your application so we know you’ve read this fully





We are looking for someone who can turn AI into real business value, not just experiments. If that’s you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Senior Bookkeeper / Accountant - VA
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Bookkeeper / Accountant to manage our financial records, ensure accuracy in reporting, and support day-to-day accounting operations. This role is essential in maintaining the financial health of the business and ensuring compliance with accounting standards.



Role Summary:

*The role requires a detail-oriented and proactive Senior Bookkeeper.

*The candidate will handle day-to-day financial operations, reporting, and reconciliation.

*Expected to operate independently and eventually take full ownership of the bookkeeping function, with oversight from the company accountant.



Requirements:

*Vendor & Farm Reporting: Ability to prepare and maintain detailed reports tracking products/quantities received versus sent by vendors, identify discrepancies, and manage large datasets involving 300+ vendors/farms.

*Bank Reconciliation: Experience performing daily, weekly, and monthly reconciliations, ensuring all transactions are properly recorded and discrepancies are investigated and resolved.

*Bookkeeping & Financial Management: Strong experience in full-cycle bookkeeping using QuickBooks Online, including accounts payable/receivable, expense tracking, income recording, and vendor transactions.

*Excel-Based Data Management: Advanced Excel skills to manage large datasets, perform data validation, build reports, and ensure accuracy across financial records.

*Transition to Ownership: Capability to gradually take over full bookkeeping responsibilities from the current accountant while maintaining accuracy and continuity.

*Attention to Detail & Data Accuracy: Strong ability to identify mismatches, missing entries, and inconsistencies across reports and financial data.

*Independent 

*Work Capability: Ability to operate independently, take ownership of tasks, and ensure timely and accurate reporting.

*Preferred: Experience working in high-volume vendor environments such as supply chain, agriculture, or import-export businesses.



IMPORTANT — How to Apply

Please complete this form: wkf.ms/3GO4a9J

Attach your resume and include a brief self-introduction (under one minute) so we can get a sense of your communication style. We prefer natural, unscripted introductions.

title: Video Editors, Motion Designers & Social Content Creators
description:
About the Opportunity



Kollegly is building a curated network of top creative professionals to work with high-quality German companies in full-time, long-term roles.



This is not freelance or project-based work.

We focus on stable, full-time opportunities with companies that need consistent, high-quality video and content production.



If you’re looking for reliable income, professional clients, and long-term growth, this opportunity is for you.



Open Roles



We are currently onboarding creatives in the following areas:



~ Video Editors (Short-form, long-form, ads, YouTube)

~ Motion Graphics Designers (2D/3D, animations, ads)

~ Social Media Content Creators (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)



You may specialize in one or combine multiple skill sets.



What You Can Expect



~ Full-time remote roles with vetted German companies

~ Stable monthly salary (no freelance uncertainty)

~ Long-term collaboration and consistent workload

~ Professional, international work environment

~ Direct communication with hiring companies



Compensation



~ Competitive monthly salary based on experience and specialization

~ Typical range: $700 – $1,800+ USD per month

~ Junior creatives may start lower depending on experience

~ Highly skilled editors and motion designers can earn at the higher end or above

~ Salary is fixed and paid monthly (full-time employment)



Minimum Requirements



~ Minimum 2 years of relevant experience

~ Strong portfolio (video samples, motion work, or social content)

~ Good written and spoken English

~ Reliable internet connection and remote work setup

~ Availability for full-time work (40 hours per week)



Preferred Qualifications



~ Experience creating content for social media platforms (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube)

~ Strong storytelling and content structuring skills

~ Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or similar

~ Understanding of trends, hooks, and engagement-driven content

~ Ability to work with brand guidelines and maintain consistency



Selection Process



To maintain a high-quality talent pool, all candidates go through a structured evaluation:



~ Application review

~ Pre-screening questions

~ Portfolio and content evaluation

~ Optional interview or test task



Only top-performing candidates will be accepted into the platform and matched with companies.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



~ Primary specialization (Video Editing / Motion / Social Content)

~ Years of experience

~ Portfolio (videos, reels, or content samples)

~ Tools you use (e.g., Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut)

~ Expected monthly salary (USD)

~ Earliest availability



Important Note



We receive a high volume of applications.

Only complete and relevant applications will be reviewed.



Final Note



We prioritize quality over quantity.

Our goal is to work with a small group of highly skilled creatives and match them with the right companies for long-term success.



If you are serious about building a long-term career with international companies, we encourage you to apply.



Join Kollegly and become part of a curated global talent network.

 channels.

Job Benefits:

title: Google Ads Specialist (PPC, Bing Ads)
description:
We are a performance marketing agency working with high-ticket B2B service companies (waste management, environmental services, industrial trades).



We do NOT care about vanity metrics.



We care about:

• Cost per qualified lead

• Revenue

• Efficiency

• Smart scaling



We are looking for a Google Ads specialist who understands how to turn Search campaigns into predictable revenue.



This is NOT an entry-level role.



???? What You’ll Be Responsible For



• Building and restructuring Google Search campaigns

• Deep search term analysis & negative keyword control

• Match type strategy (Broad vs Phrase vs Exact — and when to use each)

• Improving Quality Score

• Lowering CPL

• Location-based campaign structuring

• Conversion tracking audits (forms + calls)

• Weekly performance reporting with real insights (not generic summaries)



Primary focus: Search only (high-intent B2B).



???? What Success Looks Like



• Reduce CPL from $214 ? under $120

• Improve lead quality (not just volume)

• Clean campaign structure

• No wasted spend from sloppy setup



???? You Are a Good Fit If:



• You think in terms of search terms, not just keywords

• You regularly check the Search Terms report

• You understand conversion signal quality

• You know when Broad match works — and when it burns money

• You’ve managed $3k–$20k/month budgets

• You can show real before/after results



???? Not a Fit If:



• You also want to “help with SEO and social media”

• You’ve only run eCommerce or boosted posts

• You rely heavily on Google’s auto-recommendations

• You cannot show real past results



???? Required Experience



• 3+ years Google Ads experience

• B2B lead generation experience preferred

• Experience lowering CPL in competitive industries

• Strong understanding of conversion tracking



???? Compensation



• Starting at $5/hour

• 1 hour per day (Mon–Fri) to start

• 2-week paid trial

• Increased hours + pay based on performance



If you can materially improve results, you will grow with us.



???? To Apply (IMPORTANT)
 
 with subject line "PPC Manager"



To be considered, you MUST answer:



Share one example where you lowered CPL. Include:



-Before CPL

-After CPL

-What you changed



• Your IQ test result from: 
/take-the-test/ (free version is
ed to you)



Applications without these answers will be ignored.



This is for someone who wants long-term growth, not just another client.



If you’re serious about performance marketing, apply.

title: Data Analyst & Job Analysis
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented VA to support production with basic job analysis and daily reporting. This person will compile data from daily job site reports, organize it into a clean, useful format, and distribute it to the team consistently.

This is primarily a numbers/accounting mindset role (not engineering). The goal is to improve visibility, tracking, and decision-making through reliable daily data collection and reporting.



Key Responsibilities

• Collect and compile data from daily job site reports (multiple crews/projects)

• Maintain a standardized daily/weekly reporting format (we may already have a template)

• Organize production data into clear summaries (by job, crew, dates, etc.)

• Identify missing data and follow up internally to close gaps

• Distribute daily production summaries to leadership/stakeholders

• Support simple job analysis reporting (basic trends, totals, variances, etc.)

• Keep data clean and consistent for long-term tracking



Required Skills

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy

• Comfortable with numbers and reconciling information across reports

• Solid Excel / Google Sheets skills (sorting, filtering, basic formulas)

• Reliable communication and ability to follow a daily process

• Able to work independently and hit daily deadlines



Nice to Have

• Experience with job costing, field reporting, or accounting support

• Familiarity with CRMs, project management tools, or operations reporting

• Basic dashboard/report building skills (Sheets, Excel, Looker Studio, etc.)



Deliverables / Success Looks Like

• Daily production report delivered on time, consistently

• Clean, organized data leadership can use to make decisions

• Fewer reporting gaps and clearer operational visibility week to week



How to Apply

: 

Subject: Plastic Fusion Job Analysis

Include:

• A short voice note or Loom introducing yourself (1–2 minutes)

• Your resume or portfolio (if available)

• Your IQ test result from: 
/take-the-test/ (free version is
ed to you)

title: Real Estate ISA (2+ Years Exp)
description:
We are a US-based real estate investment company looking for a motivated, high-energy Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to join our team full-time. Your primary role is simple: call homeowners, build rapport, and identify motivated sellers who want a cash offer on their property.



We are looking for a "Rockstar" who doesn't just read a script but knows how to have a real conversation and handle objections with ease.



Daily Responsibilities:



Make
outbound dials per day using our multi-line dialer (BatchDialer)

Note: We prioritize quality conversations over raw dial counts. If you are on the phone with motivated sellers, we expect the dial count to naturally be lower.



Identify the "4 Pillars" for every lead: Motivation, Timeline, Property Condition, and Price.



Accurately tag leads and leave detailed notes in our CRM (BatchDialer)



Transfer "Hot Leads" to the Acquisitions Manager immediately.





Requirements:



Experience: Minimum 2-3  years of cold calling specifically for US Real Estate Wholesaling.



Language: Native-level English with a clear, friendly, and neutral accent.



Tech: Must have a reliable computer, noise-canceling headset, and high-speed wired internet (at least 15 Mbps).



Schedule: Must be able to work  (10am-6pm EST / CST). This is a 11pm - 7am PHT (Philippine Time) shift. Please only apply if you have a proven track record of working the graveyard shift long-term.



Environment: A dedicated quiet home office with ZERO background noise (no roosters, dogs, or traffic).



Compensation:



Base Pay: $6.00 - $8.00 USD per hour (depending on experience).

Bonuses: $400 bonus for every deal we close that you generated.





Stability: Long-term, 40 hours per week position with room for growth.





HOW TO APPLY (Follow these steps exactly):

1. Subject Line: Change your application subject to: "2+ Years Wholesale ISA - [Your Name] - [Your Favorite color]"

2. Audio Sample (Mandatory): Provide a link to a 30-60 second voice recording using 
.

Note: Applications without a link or with "Private" access links will be ignored.

title: Data Specialist
description:
We are Retain Media, a fully remote digital media agency specialising in the automotive category. Our focus is on manufacturers and dealers and our core industries include caravans, motorbikes, trucks, trailers, marine, agriculture, and construction machinery. Our target market comprises roughly 12,000 businesses.

We offer our clients SEO, SEM, social and programmatic ad management services, supported by a strong focus on data integrity and reporting accuracy. Our team is passionate about helping clients understand and improve their digital performance through reliable, clear, and actionable insights.

We’re looking for a detail-focused and proactive Data Specialist to support our growth and maintain high reporting standards across the agency.

Objectives of this role

As a Data Specialist at Retain Media, you will play a key role in ensuring the accuracy and reliability of reporting, tracking, and analytics across client accounts.



You will support the team by managing end-of-month reporting, auditing conversion tracking, troubleshooting data issues, and leading platform integrations. You’ll also contribute to internal reporting projects and help improve the way we use and share data.



This role involves technical setup and maintenance, collaboration across teams, and a strong commitment to data accuracy, clarity, and continuous improvement.



What you will be doing day-to-day

Managing end-of-month reporting for clients, ensuring accuracy, clarity, and timely delivery

Setting up, auditing, and maintaining conversion tracking across platforms like GA4 and GTM

Troubleshooting data and dashboard issues across Looker Studio, Agency Analytics, and other tools

Supporting client onboarding by validating tracking setups and connecting reporting platforms

Monitoring data health and proactively fixing issues before they affect reporting

Contributing to internal data projects and cross-team initiatives

Sharing relevant updates and changes across analytics platforms with the wider team

Continually improving internal processes and documentation for reporting and tracking

Ongoing learning and staying up to date with changes in digital analytics tools



Key Responsibilities

Data Accuracy & Reporting

Ensuring consistent and accurate reporting across all client accounts, with a focus on clear data presentation and actionable insights.

Tracking & Analytics Setup:

Setting up, auditing, and maintaining tracking systems (GA4, GTM, GSC, etc.) to capture key events and conversions across websites and platforms.

Dashboard Management

Building and maintaining client dashboards in platforms like Looker Studio and Agency Analytics, and resolving any data integration or display issues.

Platform Integration & Maintenance

Managing data transfers between reporting systems, troubleshooting syncing issues, and supporting internal tooling updates.

Performance Monitoring

Proactively monitoring metrics, identifying anomalies or data discrepancies, and collaborating with delivery teams to provide context and solutions.

Collaboration & Communication

Working closely with account managers, SEO, SEM, and social teams to ensure reliable tracking and performance reporting across campaigns.

Process Improvement

Contributing to the ongoing development of internal data processes, reporting frameworks, and documentation.

Learning & Adaptation

Keeping up with platform changes and industry best practices to help the team stay ahead and improve performance visibility.







In 30 days, you will

Be across Retain’s reporting processes and end-of-month workflow

Have supported at least one full end-of-month reporting cycle

Started basic audits and small tracking or dashboard tasks

Reviewed key process documentation and flagged any support or training needs

In 3 months:

Confidently manage end-of-month reporting with minimal oversight

Set up and audit tracking for new clients during onboarding

Regularly audit tracking and resolve discrepancies proactively

Independently troubleshoot dashboard issues across key platforms

Understand key metrics, reporting templates, and client priorities

Communicate clearly with internal teams on data issues and updates

Contribute to small cross-team data tasks and transfers

In 6 months:

Fully own end-of-month reporting activities

Maintain and optimise tracking to ensure data accuracy

Handle complex tracking and reporting fixes across platforms

Stay ahead of GA4, GTM, and other tool updates

Contribute to broader data and internal reporting projects

Manage time and tasks effectively, keeping stakeholders updated

Share relevant platform or industry updates with the team

In 12 months and beyond:

Be the agency’s go-to expert for data, tracking, and reporting

Own and refine internal processes for reporting and data quality

Lead improvements in reporting infrastructure and automation

Stay ahead of platform changes and guide internal updates

Scope and lead data projects that improve efficiency and insight

Build scalable tracking frameworks to support agency growth

Shape tracking strategies during client onboarding

Contribute to internal thought leadership around data







What will help you succeed

Solid knowledge of GA4, GTM, GSC, Looker Studio, and related tools

Confidence with spreadsheets, data connectors, and dashboards

Strong attention to detail and commitment to data accuracy

Problem-solving skills and independence in troubleshooting

Clear, proactive communication

A strong sense of ownership and accountability

Curiosity and drive to stay current with evolving platforms

Effective time management and task prioritisation

A collaborative, team-focused mindset







What we offer:

A growing agency with a strong culture of collaboration

Flexibility to work from home, with a friendly and supportive remote team

Ongoing learning opportunities, including internal training and a budget for external courses

Exposure to a wide range of tools, platforms, and real-world data challenges

Opportunities to contribute to internal innovation and process improvements

Annual international conference attendance

A team that genuinely values quality, thoughtfulness, and shared wins 



How to Apply

Please submit your application using this form:



We will only consider applications using this form.  Any questions that read like they were written by AI will be ignored.

title: Are you a Formalist? We're hiring an E-Commerce Operations manager/Assistant" $4-9/hr · Global team
description:
Are you a Formalist? We're hiring.

E-Commerce Operations Assistant/Manager · Full-time · Remote · $4–9/hr · Danish company, global team



Most job posts ask for experience. We don't care about that. We care about who you are.

We run multiple e-commerce brands from Denmark. We move fast, we use AI tools, and we build systems that scale. Right now, we need one specific type of person to keep our operation running perfectly while we build the future.

That person is a Formalist.

You might be a Formalist if:



You read the instructions before starting anything

You make a checklist before you make a move

Mistakes bother you more than they bother most people

You research before you ask

You deliver a detailed first draft, not a half-finished question

You follow through without being reminded

The phrase "good enough" makes you uncomfortable



What you'll do:



Keep daily operations running without things falling through the cracks

Build and maintain SOPs for everything we do

Handle supplier communication and 3PL coordination

Hold suppliers accountable to contracts and deadlines

Help transition our customer service to AI



What we offer:



Full training – no experience required

Real responsibility from week one

A team that invests in people who invest in themselves

Performance raise after 90 days if you deliver



One requirement on availability:

This is a full-time role with a fixed daily schedule. We need you present and focused during agreed hours every single day. If consistency is a challenge for you, this role isn't the right fit – and that's okay.

NOTE, that we will do a part time test period of 2-3 weeks.

How to apply:



Start your subject line with READY

Record a 1–2 min Loom video – no script, no notes, just talk to us like a real person

Include your DISC result (or another personality/talent test) in your application.



Applications without a Loom video AND Personality/talent/DISC result will not be considered.

title: Senior Project Coordinator (Print & Signage) – $1,500 AUD
description:
Company: Mint Imaging (Australia)

Location: Remote (AEST Hours) + 1 Week Onsite Training in Manila

Salary: $1,500 AUD per month (Paid Monthly)



The Role:

At Mint Imaging, we don’t do "micro-management." We are looking for an Accountable Project Manager who can take full ownership of their own client portfolio. You won't just be passing messages; you will be responsible for the success, accuracy, and deadlines of every job assigned to you.



You are the face of the business for your clients. You ensure their vision is translated perfectly to our production floor, and you are responsible for the "Gross Profit" of your projects by ensuring zero reprints and efficient workflows.



What you will own:



End-to-End Management: From the initial quote request to the final delivery, you are the primary point of contact.



Production Accountability: You work directly with our Prepress and Production teams to ensure your jobs are scheduled and moving.



Problem Solving: If a deadline is at risk, you don't wait for permission—you find a solution, communicate with the client, and adjust the plan.



Client Growth: By providing incredible service and technical accuracy, you help grow your assigned accounts by 20%–30% through trust and reliability.



Who you are:



A "Business Owner" mindset. You treat every project like it's your own money on the line.



Technical knowledge of Large Format Print, Signage, or Manufacturing.



High-level English and the confidence to lead a phone call with an Australian CEO.



Experience managing multiple moving parts without losing your cool.



THE MINT IMAGING CHALLENGE (Accountability Test)

We only review applications that complete this step. Please include a brief cover letter starting with the code: "MINT OWNER 2026".



Then, answer the following Accountability Scenario:



Scenario: You are managing a $10,000 signage project for a major event this Friday. It is now Wednesday afternoon.



The Issue: Our local courier just informed us they lost 1 of the 3 boxes for this shipment.



The Status: The Production Manager (Steve) is flat out on the floor and doesn't have time to help you figure this out.



The Prepress: Our Bali designer has the original files.



Your Task:



List the first 3 actions you take to resolve this without involving the business owner (Adam).



Write the exact
 you send to the client to inform them of the situation while maintaining their confidence in us.



How do you ensure this "Lost Box" scenario never happens again for your future clients?

title: Marketing & Website Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)
description:
Job Title: Marketing & Website Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)

Company: Elevated Tahoe Properties

Location: Remote



About Us

Elevated Tahoe Properties manages high-touch short-term rental and property portfolios focused on guest experience, operational excellence, and high-performing marketing that drives direct bookings. We’re hiring a proactive, creative, and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our website, digital marketing, social media, and lead generation efforts.



Our Company Culture:

- We are a fun, young company growing quickly

- We value open communication and adding in humor whenever possible

- Our team is self driven and empowered to handle their own responsibilities without being micromanaged

- We inspire each other to become the best version of ourselves we can possibly become.

- We lead by example and use positive reinforcement to inspire others to strive for personal and professional greatness.



Role Summary

You will be responsible for helping us grow our online presence and increase direct vacation rental bookings through website updates, landing page creation, lead capture strategy,
 marketing, and social media content support. This role requires strong design instincts, attention to detail, marketing experience, and a solid understanding of WordPress, Elementor, and basic website coding.



Key Responsibilities

-Improve website layout, visuals, and user experience to support conversion goals

-Monitor inbound leads and help organize follow-up and lead nurturing workflows

-Create and manage nurture
 campaigns for existing guests, past guests, and new leads

-Support list building, audience segmentation, and
 campaign improvements

-Assist with marketing asset creation for promotions, campaigns, and seasonal offers

-Maintain brand consistency across website pages,
 marketing, and social media content

-Collaborate with leadership on ideas to improve direct bookings, lead generation, and guest engagement



Qualifications

-Proven experience in digital marketing, website management, or lead generation

-Strong hands-on experience with WordPress and Elementor

-Strong design skills with an eye for clean, polished, high-converting content

-Experience editing social media video and photo content

-Experience with
 marketing platforms and nurture campaigns

-Comfortable creating landing pages and understanding basic conversion strategy

-Decent to strong website coding basics, including familiarity with HTML/CSS and light troubleshooting

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills

-Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to manage multiple moving pieces

-Able to work independently, take initiative, and bring creative solutions to the table

-Familiarity with Asana or similar project management tools





Non?Negotiable Requirements

-Reliable backup power (UPS or generator) to prevent downtime during outages

-Dual monitors for efficient multitasking

-Backup internet (secondary wired connection or mobile hotspot) with stable speeds

-Quiet, dedicated workspace and dependable computer

-Preferred Experience with the Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro) or similar creative tools

-Strong video editing proficiency for creating engaging short-form content

-Deep understanding of social media marketing trends, algorithms, and best practices

-Experience working with hospitality, vacation rentals, real estate, or travel brands



Required Days/Hours

Monday - Friday 8AM to 5PM Pacific Time (1 hour unpaid Lunch Break)



Compensation Target:

$950 per month + monthly KPI bonus / 40 hours per week — salary negotiable based on experience.



What We Offer

-Remote role supporting a growing vacation rental and hospitality brand

-Opportunity to directly impact bookings, lead generation, and brand growth

-Creative, collaborative team environment with room to contribute ideas and improve systems



How to Apply (only
 applications will be considered)



:

Include:

Only applicants who follow the instructions exactly and demonstrate strong attention to detail will be considered.



Thank you and we look forward to working with you!





~ Elevated Tahoe Properties Team

title: Sales Manager (Remote)
description:
Position Overview



You own client development and sales follow-through from first contact through signed work. Your job is to generate opportunities, build trust with prospects, guide them through the sales process, and convert qualified leads into profitable projects that align with our standards.



At Stout Design Build Inc., this role protects both growth and client experience. You are expected to bring in the right clients, communicate clearly, keep the pipeline moving, and create a smooth handoff once work is sold.



Success Profile and Targets



You are successful in this role when the pipeline stays active, qualified opportunities move forward, and signed work aligns with company goals, capacity, and standards. You create a strong first impression, follow up consistently, and prevent opportunities from going cold.



Default targets (until confirmed):

* New qualified leads added weekly

* Lead response time within 1 business hour

* Sales conversion rate of 25%+ on qualified opportunities

* Signed revenue meets monthly target

* 100% of active opportunities updated weekly

* Client handoffs to production completed without missing information



Key Responsibilities

Lead Generation and Prospecting



* You own outbound prospecting and relationship-building to find new clients that fit our work

* You identify lead sources, follow up on inquiries, and maintain consistent weekly prospecting activity

* You build and maintain a healthy pipeline instead of relying solely on referrals

* You track lead sources and identify which channels produce the best-fit projects



Client Communication and Sales Process



* You manage prospect communication from first contact through signed agreement

* You qualify opportunities early to focus time on the right clients and projects

* You guide clients through next steps, answer questions, and maintain 
ntum

* You follow up consistently and prevent opportunities from stalling



Estimating and Proposal Coordination



* You help coordinate scope review, estimate follow-up, and proposal presentation with the Owner or project team

* You ensure clients understand next steps, timing, and requirements to move forward

* You document conversations, objections, and decisions clearly

* You help align pricing, scope discussions, and expectations with company standards



Handoff and Internal Coordination



* You hand off sold work cleanly to the Owner, Project Manager, or production team with complete notes and expectations

* You communicate key client priorities, timeline expectations, and special considerations before work begins

* You keep internal stakeholders informed on pipeline status and upcoming work

* You help reduce surprises by ensuring sales commitments match actual delivery



Daily, Weekly, and Monthly Expectations

Daily



* Respond to new leads

* Follow up with active prospects

* Prospect for new opportunities

* Update pipeline records

* Schedule calls, meetings, and next steps

* Communicate key developments to the Owner



Weekly



* Review pipeline by stage

* Report on lead volume, conversion activity, and signed work

* Re-engage stale opportunities

* Confirm next steps for all active prospects

* Identify upcoming capacity or sales concerns



Monthly



* Review sales performance against targets

* Evaluate lead source quality

* Improve follow-up habits, qualification standards, and process consistency

* Review close rate and average deal size trends



Seasonal Expectations



* During peak seasons, focus on rapid lead response, qualification, and aligning demand with capacity

* During slower periods, focus on outbound prospecting, referral development, past-client follow-up, and pipeline building



Communication Norms



* New inbound leads should receive a same-day response whenever possible

* Active prospects should receive clear follow-up after each interaction or decision point

* Internal communication with the Owner should stay current on major opportunities, risks, and client commitments



What a Great Day Looks Like



* You respond quickly and professionally to all active opportunities

* You move multiple prospects forward instead of letting them sit

* You create at least one new opportunity through outbound effort or follow-up

* You keep the pipeline updated and ownership informed

* You help clients feel confident, informed, and ready to move forward



Required Skills and Qualifications



* Experience in sales, client management, business development, or high-touch customer communication

* Strong communication skills across phone,
, text, and video

* Ability to qualify leads, build trust, and maintain consistent follow-up

* Strong organization and documentation habits

* Ability to work independently and manage activity without constant oversight

* Ability to represent the company professionally and protect the client experience

* Experience in residential design/build, landscape, pool, remodeling, or home services is preferred

* Comfort using Buildertrend, Slack, CRM tools, spreadsheets, and scheduling systems is preferred



Company Culture and Values Alignment



* You model ownership, reliability, and strong follow-through in every client interaction

* You do what you say, respond on time, document key details, and avoid overpromising

* You protect the company’s reputation by bringing in the right clients and communicating clearly

* You create a smooth experience from first contact through handoff

* You support continuous improvement, accountability, and professionalism by staying organized, proactive, and honest

title: Real Estate Lead Response VA – Inbound Calls & SMS (U.S. Investor, New Jersey)
description:
Part time to start, opportunity to work full time based on results



I'm a real estate investor based in New Jersey who buys distressed and off-market properties directly from homeowners. I run a high-volume SMS outreach campaign and need someone to handle inbound responses — calling back sellers who replied to a text or left a missed call, having an initial conversation to gauge their situation, and filtering who is worth passing to me for a deeper conversation.



This is NOT an outbound cold calling role. You'll be responding to people who have already shown some interest. The conversations should feel natural and consultative, not scripted and robotic.

What You'll Be Doing:



Monitoring SmarterContact for inbound texts and missed calls from sellers

Calling back leads promptly and having an initial qualifying conversation

Following a call framework (not a rigid script) to assess motivation, timeline, and property condition

Tagging, noting, and organizing leads after each call

Flagging warm leads to me with a clear summary of the conversation

Booking calls or appointments with me for qualified sellers



Required:



Experience speaking with U.S. property owners or homeowners over the phone

Strong English communication skills and a clear, professional speaking voice

Comfortable having natural conversations — able to work from a framework and adapt, not just read a script

Familiarity with SMS or CRM platforms (SmarterContact, Podio, REsimpli, or similar)

Reliable internet, computer, and headset

Comfortable speaking with older homeowners and distressed sellers

Ability to take detailed notes and tag leads accurately after each call



Preferred:



Experience working with U.S. real estate investors or wholesalers

Familiarity with off-market or motivated seller acquisitions

Experience booking appointments for acquisitions managers

Familiarity with Google Calendar



Performance Bonuses Available For:



Appointments scheduled with qualified sellers

Signed and closed contracts



To Apply:

Please include the word "BURLINGTON" in the subject line, and attach a 30-second voice recording introducing yourself and briefly describing your real estate calling experience. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant (Apify + Google Sheets) for Influencer Marketing Agency
description:
We’re an influencer marketing agency looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Virtual Assistant to help us source and organize influencer leads using Apify.



Your main responsibility will be running pre-built Apify actors (scraping tools), collecting influencer data, and organizing it correctly inside Google Sheets based on our SOPs.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who is consistent, fast, and comfortable working with data.



Responsibilities:



- Run Apify actors for TikTok influencer lead scraping

- Work with two main scraping systems (hashtag scraping + profile scraping)

- Extract, clean, and format data inside Google Sheets

- Ensure all data is organized correctly following our SOP

- Deliver clean, accurate lead lists for up to 5 different brands

- Maintain consistency and attention to detail across all tasks



Requirements:



- Strong experience using Apify (this is required)

- Strong experience with Google Sheets (formatting, cleaning data, etc.)

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Ability to follow SOPs exactly

- Organized and efficient workflow

- Reliable and responsive communication



Nice to Have:



- Experience with influencer marketing or lead generation

- Familiarity with TikTok creators/influencers

- Basic understanding of data cleaning (find & replace, formatting, etc.)



Work Details:



- 3–4 days per week

~3 hours per day (with potential to increase over time)

- Flexible hours (as long as deadlines are met)

- Long-term role for the right person



To Apply:



Please include:



- Your experience with Apify (what actors/tools you’ve used)

- Your experience with Google Sheets

- Any relevant past work (especially scraping or lead generation)

- The word “Influencer” at the top of your application so we know you read this



If you’re someone who’s fast, detail-oriented, and wants to grow with a team long-term, we’d love to work with you.

title: Content Editor
description: I need an editor who can create 20-30 YT shorts and 5-10 long form(10-25min) videos PER WEEK. It is for my new clips channel that I have created. I need BARE MINIMUM 3-5 shorts per day and 5-10 longer form videos per week. I will give you access to the YT account, Instagram account, and Tik Tok accounts. The accounts are new so I’m looking to build them organically. I need someone with 2-3 experience with making viral/eye catching clips or someone who has worked with a successful content creator in the past. You will need to create the EYE CATCHING thumbnails as well as good captions and descriptions. Feel free to ask me any questions.

title: Lead Generation & Appointment Setter for Fitness Coaching Business
description:
Summary

Seeking a motivated, results-driven lead generation specialist to connect with potential clients, build relationships via social media & CRM, and book qualified Zoom consultations. Part-time weekends only. Flexible hours, performance bonuses, and a chance to grow in a fast-paced fitness business.



Part-Time | Hourly rate + Commission



About the Role



We’re a fast-growing online fitness coaching business looking for a Lead Generation Specialist / Appointment Setter to connect with potential clients, build rapport, and book qualified sales calls.



If you have a talent for starting conversations, nurturing relationships, and driving results — this role is for you!



Key Responsibilities



Lead Outreach & Engagement



Send outbound and inbound messages through social media platforms (Instagram,
, TikTok) and our CRM tool (GHL).



Maintain a minimum of 100 outbound messages per day per platform.



Qualify potential leads and schedule consultation calls with them via Zoom.



Follow-Up & Lead Nurturing



Reconnect with cold but qualified leads to restart the conversation.



Send reminders to booked leads to increase call show-up rates.



Check in with leads after calls (when the call was with another tea
mber).



Tracking & Reporting



Record daily outreach numbers, platform performance, offers made, and conversions.



Suggest and test new strategies to improve lead quality and conversion rates.



Collaboration & Communication



Attend weekly virtual tea
etings to review performance and share insights.



Stay in regular contact with the team during work hours via the provided communication channels.



What We’re Looking For



2+ years experience in social media communication or lead generation.



1+ year in online sales or appointment setting preferred.



Strong written and spoken English skills.



Tech-savvy with tools like Google Docs, G Suite, CRM platforms, Trello, and Zoom.



Self-motivated, organized, and detail-oriented.



Able to work evenings/weekends with some overlap in Eastern Standard Time.



Compensation & Growth



$4-5 hr USD + 1% commission bonus on closed sales.



Part-time.



Opportunities for pay increases based on performance.



How to Apply



When applying, please include:



A short cover letter describing your relevant experience.



A brief explanation of why you’d be a great fit for this role.



Any examples of past work in lead generation, appointment setting, or social media outreach.



???? Tip for Applicants: We’re looking for someone who is proactive, communicative, and results-driven — if that’s you, we’d love to hear from you!

Daily Tasks

, Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

title: Remote Operations & Executive Support Specialist — US Entrepreneur
description:
I’m a US-based entrepreneur running multiple projects - a technology consulting practice, a content brand, and ongoing enterprise IT work. I need a sharp, reliable right hand who can help me stay on top of everything. This is a long-term role for someone who wants stability, variety, and room to grow.

This is NOT a generic VA gig. You’ll be part operations specialist, part executive assistant, part content support. Every day is a little different, and that’s what makes it interesting.



???? TO APPLY: Complete this form — 

Include the word “Operator” in your OnlineJobs.ph message. Do NOT use the default Apply button with a generic message



WHAT YOUR DAY LOOKS LIKE



Your day has two modes:



MORNING — ACTIVE MODE (2-3 hours)

You start 2-3 hours before US business hours. During this window you’ll:

• Open the enterprise ticketing system and review all open tickets

• Check for stale tickets that haven’t been updated and add status notes

• Follow up on pending items — if a pending status expires, take action or re-pend with a reason

• Follow up with external vendors/support teams on open service requests

• Identify and flag duplicate tickets for closure

• Draft customer-facing updates and internal status notes

• Build a clear daily briefing for me: what needs my attention today, in priority order

• Check my
 and flag anything that needs a reply, with a draft if possible

When I sit down, everything is organized and I know exactly what to do.



AFTERNOON — MONITORING, CONTENT & ADMIN MODE (3-4 hours)

• Monitor incoming tickets,
s, and messages — handle routine items per the playbook, flag anything that needs my input via

• Help with my content brand — format posts, schedule content, post to social platforms, engage with comments, research topics I’m writing about

• Handle personal and business admin — track bills and due dates, organize documents, manage subscriptions, research purchases, schedule appointments, keep my life running smoothly

• Maintain documentation, SOPs, and trackers

• Take on whatever tedious-but-necessary tasks I don’t have time for — data entry, research, file organization, follow-ups, you name it

Some days are busy for all 6 hours. Some days the afternoon is quieter. But you always need to be responsive within 15 minutes during your shift.



THE THREE AREAS YOU’LL SUPPORT

 1. Enterprise IT Operations (~2-3 hours/day)

This is the anchor of the role. You’ll work inside a ticketing system managing IT support i
 for a US healthcare organization. The work includes:

• Triaging and prioritizing support tickets

• Adding journal notes and status updates (minimum weekly on every open ticket)

• Monitoring pending statuses and acting on expiration reminders

• Following up with software vendors on open service requests and updating customers

• Catching duplicate tickets and flagging for closure

• Drafting professional, empathetic customer responses and concise internal notes

If you’ve worked in a BPO helpdesk, IT service desk, or healthcare support environment, you’ll recognize this immediately.

 2. Content & Brand Support (~1-2 hours/day)

I run a content brand focused on ADHD, productivity, and AI-powered systems. You’ll help with the execution side:

• Formatting written posts for social media (X/Twitter, Threads, LinkedIn)

• Scheduling and publishing content using scheduling tools

• Light engagement — responding to comments, liking relevant posts

• Researching topics, pulling data or references for articles I’m writing

• Organizing content drafts and assets in shared folders

• Helping with any repetitive content production tasks

You don’t need to be a content strategist. I handle the ideas and writing. I need someone who takes a finished draft and makes it live in the world.

 3. Personal & Business Admin (~1 hour/day)

• Tracking bills, due dates, subscriptions, and renewals

• Organizing documents (tax docs, receipts, contracts)

• Researching products, services, and vendors when I need to make a purchase decision

• Scheduling appointments and managing calendar items

• General inbox management — sorting, flagging, drafting replies

• Any other admin tasks that eat time and don’t require my brain specifically



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Must-haves:

• Excellent written American English — indistinguishable from a native speaker. You’ll draft communications going to US clients and stakeholders.

• 2+ years in BPO, remote support, helpdesk, executive assistant, or VA roles with a single employer or structured environment.

• Experience with ticketing systems — ServiceNow, Jira, Zendesk, Freshdesk, Cherwell, or similar. You understand ticket lifecycle: open, in progress, pending, resolved.

• Ability to context-switch — in a single morning you might update a support ticket, schedule a social media post, and research a tax deadline. You handle variety without getting scattered.

• Self-management skills — you work 6 hours/day with a daily check-in, not constant supervision.

• Reliable internet and a quiet workspace.

• Able to start your shift 2-3 hours before 9am US Eastern Time.

Strong nice-to-haves (any of these move you to the top):

• Healthcare IT or US healthcare BPO experience

• Familiarity with EHR/EMR systems or clinical IT environments

• ITSM/ITIL background

• Social media management experience — especially X/Twitter, Threads, LinkedIn

• Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to work faster — drafting, summarizing, researching

• Experience supporting an entrepreneur or executive as a personal/executive assistant

• Familiarity with tools like Notion, Google Workspace, Canva, Buffer/Hootsuite, Loom



WHAT KIND OF PERSON THRIVES HERE

You’re the executor. You take a plan and make it happen. When you see a ticket going stale, you update it before being asked. When there’s a post ready to publish, you format it and schedule it without waiting for a reminder. When a bill is coming due, you flag it three days early. You find satisfaction in a clean queue, an organized tracker, and a to-do list with everything checked off.

You’re not looking for a job where you do the same thing for 8 hours straight. You like variety. You want to work closely with someone, understand how they think, and become the person they can’t run their life without.



SCHEDULE & PAY

• Hours: 6 hours/day, Monday-Friday (30 hours/week)

• Rate: $7-$9/hr USD depending on experience

• Raise structure: Performance review at 30 days with a rate increase for strong performers

• Payment: Weekly via Wise, paid every Friday

• Start: ASAP — paid 2-week trial period

• Duration: Long-term (12+ months for the right person)

• Growth: As trust builds, the role expands. This can become a true chief-of-staff position for the right person.

• Equipment: You provide your own computer and internet

title: Virtual Assistant (VA) – Amazon FBA Wholesale Expert
description:
We are a new wholesale business selling branded products on Amazon Canada (
). We are looking for an experienced, autonomous Virtual Assistant to help us launch and grow our business. The goal is to build a long-term, trust-based working relationship. You will be our right-hand person, managing the day-to-day operations of our Amazon seller account.



Responsibilities & Daily TasksYou will work closely with me (the strategist/decision-maker) and be responsible for the following:



· Product Research & Selection (The most important task)

  · Use professional tools (Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or SellerSprite) to identify profitable branded products on 
 .

  · Analyze demand, competition (number of sellers, saturation), margins, and seasonality.

  · Systematically check if a brand is "gated" (restricted) and what approvals are needed .

  · Present clear reports with the top 5–10 product opportunities for my review.

· Sourcing & Supplier Relations (Distributors)

  · Research and find official distributors and authorized wholesalers in Canada .

  · Contact brands and distributors via
 or phone to open wholesale accounts.

  · Negotiate prices, terms (MOQ, payment terms), and obtain product catalogs.

  · Gather and organize all supplier documentation.

· Administrative & Compliance Management

  · Obtain proforma invoices and purchase invoices that meet Amazon's requirements (dated within last 180 days, minimum 10 units per product, supplier contact details) .

  · Secure Letters of Authorization (LOA) from brands when required, and handle all ungating requests in Seller Central .

  · Verify products meet Canadian regulations (bilingual labeling, NPN numbers, etc.) .

· Operational Account Management (Seller Central)

  · Create offers on existing product listings (ASINs).

  · Optimize titles, bullet points, and descriptions for SEO (organic search ranking).

  · Manage FBA inventory: create shipment plans, coordinate labeling (if using a 3PL), monitor stock levels to prevent stockouts and plan replenishment .

  · Handle customer service: reply to messages, manage returns and claims .

· Advertising & Performance Tracking

  · Set up and manage Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands) .

  · Monitor daily performance (ACoS, ROAS, impressions, clicks) and optimize campaigns accordingly .

  · Prepare a weekly performance report with key metrics and insights

title: CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE COORDINATOR (FAMILY EXPERIENCE TEAM | ATTIO PREFERRED)
description:
ABOUT RELATIONAL MINDS



Relational Minds is an Australian child and family mental health organisation delivering relationship-focused, evidence-informed programs to parents, children, educators, and leaders. Our philosophy is grounded in relationship-first approaches, compassionate communication, and trauma-informed, evidence-based practice.



THE OPERATIONAL CONTEXT



We coordinate complex assessment and treatment pathways involving multiple clinicians and strict timelines. Our Family Experience Team ensures every family’s journey is organised, visible, and followed through.



We are transitioning from spreadsheet-based tracking to a modern relationship management system using Attio CRM. Attio will serve as our central system for managing family journeys, lifecycle stages, and service coordination.



WHY WORK WITH US

	•	Values: We value kindness, clarity, and reliable teamwork.

	•	Culture: We offer a calm, respectful, emotionally intelligent work environment.

	•	Leadership: You will work with supportive Australian leadership that values initiative and good judgement.

	•	Growth: This is a meaningful long-term role where you will help shape how our systems evolve as the organisation grows.



THE ROLE



You will coordinate the end-to-end journey for families, acting as the operational guide who ensures their progress through our service stays organised and on schedule.



This is a coordination role requiring assertive communication, structured thinking, and strong system management.



You will work primarily within Attio CRM, helping maintain a clear view of where each family sits in their journey, ensuring tasks are completed on time, and identifying risks before delays occur.



You will work within a small Customer Experience team and report to the Customer Experience Manager.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

	•	Manage the family journey

Track each family’s progress from intake through assessment, treatment blocks, and follow-up using Attio pipelines and lifecycle stages.

	•	Maintain data integrity

Ensure Attio remains the central “source of truth” for family records, service stages, and communication history.

	•	Coordinate timelines

Monitor clinician and administrative tasks and follow up when deadlines are approaching or overdue.

	•	System management

Maintain clean, structured CRM records including custom fields, tags, and views that allow the team to quickly see where attention is needed.

	•	Risk identification

Identify delays, missing information, or stalled cases and escalate to the Customer Experience Manager.

	•	Documentation coordination

Ensure consents, reports, and key documents are correctly linked and stored within our Microsoft 365 environment.



REQUIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE

	•	Strong CRM experience

Experience using a CRM to manage customer or client journeys across multiple stages.

	•	Attio CRM experience strongly preferred

Familiarity with Attio pipelines, custom fields, views, and workflow organisation.

	•	Structured data management

Experience maintaining accurate records and ensuring systems remain clean and reliable.

	•	Workflow coordination

Proven ability to coordinate multiple stakeholders and follow up professionals to ensure timelines are met.

	•	Professional written communication

Strong written English and the ability to communicate calmly with Australian families.

	•	Experience working with Australian companies

Understanding Australian professional expectations and communication style.



HIGHLY REGARDED

	•	Experience in Australian healthcare, allied health, or NDIS-related services

	•	Experience implementing or managing CRM systems during organisational growth

	•	Familiarity with automation tools such as Zapier, Power Automate, or CRM workflow automation

	•	Background in operations coordination, client success, or service delivery



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

	•	Not a general Virtual Assistant role

	•	Not a passive data-entry position

	•	Not a call centre role



You will actively coordinate workflows and ensure families and clinicians stay on track.



WORK DETAILS

	•	Remote position (work from home)

	•	Full-time, long-term role

	•	Work aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST) business hours

	•	Direct collaboration with an Australian leadership team



HOW TO APPLY



Please include in your application:

	•	A summary of your experience using CRM systems to track customer or client journeys

	•	Your experience using Attio CRM or similar platforms

	•	Your experience working with Australian companies

	•	One example of how you followed up with professionals to keep a workflow on schedule



Shortlisted candidates will complete a short practical task demonstrating how they would structure and manage a client journey within a CRM system.

title: IT & Marketing Systems Integration Specialist
description:
About Us

We are Australia's #1 commercial property specialist with more than 20,000 clients in our database.



Our Founder and CEO is a trusted name among Australia’s commercial property investors for leading insights and developments in the commercial real estate industry, and founded our boutique commercial property buyers agency to help and educate investors about investing in commercial property. We value efficiency and innovation, and we rely on our interconnected tech stack to maintain a competitive edge.



We are currently seeking an experienced IT & Marketing Integration Specialist to join our organisation. This full-time role offers a unique opportunity to contribute to the success of our organisation by leveraging technology to streamline our sales, marketing, and operations. You will work alongside a talented and collaborative team, playing a vital role in achieving our strategic goals.



About the Role

We are seeking an IT & Marketing Systems Integration Specialist to be the operational backbone of our tech stack. The ideal candidate will be a highly proficient administrator, integrator, and data specialist for our core platforms (GHL, Monday, ActiveCampaign, WordPress, Google Workspace, Webmail and Slack), focusing on driving efficiency, maintaining data integrity, and ensuring reliable data flow to support our commercial property engagements.



Key Responsibilities

- Platform Administration: Serve as the primary administrator and configuration expert for GoHighLevel (GHL), Monday CRM, ActiveCampaign, WordPress, Slack and related applications.

- Website Management: Maintain and update our core website, demonstrating expert proficiency in WordPress, including theme, plugin, and security management. Ensure seamless integration between the WordPress site and GHL forms/tracking.

- Integration & Data Flow: Design, implement, and maintain reliable, two-way integrations between all core systems (GHL, Monday CRM, WordPress) and internal tools like Slack and our Project Management Tool.

- Data Automation & Analytics: Develop solutions using middleware (e.g., Zapier, Make/Integromat) to automate data synchronisation between platforms and Google Sheets. This includes integrating social media data to track lead quality and marketing ROI effectively.

- Google Workspace & Webmail Management: Handle the day-to-day administration, maintenance, and security of our Google Workspace environment (Gmail, Drive, Calendar). This includes user provisioning/deprovisioning, managing security policies (2FA), setting up organisational units, and troubleshooting
/delivery issues across all webmail clients.

- System Optimisation: Monitor performance, troubleshoot complex integration and data errors, and proactively suggest and implement improvements to enhance overall system efficiency and security.

- User Support: Provide technical support, documentation, and staff training, empowering them to effectively use our integrated systems.



Other functions that may be assigned from time to time.



Required Experience & Skills

- Minimum 2-4 years of hands-on experience in system administration, integration, or a similar IT support role.

- Expert proficiency in managing and maintaining websites using WordPress, including security best practices, troubleshooting plugin conflicts, and optimising performance.

- Strong working proficiency with GoHighLevel (GHL), including workflow automation, campaign setup, and funnel management.

- Proven experience administering and integrating a CRM system, preferably Monday CRM.

- Familiarity with marketing automation platforms, specifically ActiveCampaign.

- Demonstrable knowledge of social media monitoring or analytics tools and the ability to integrate this data with marketing/CRM systems for comprehensive reporting.

- Proficiency in integrating applications with Google Sheets and Docs for advanced data storage and manipulation.

- Expert knowledge of Google Workspace (formerly G Suite) Administration, including hands-on experience with the Admin Console, DNS records (MX, SPF, DKIM), and
 security/delivery management.

- Extensive experience using integration middleware (e.g., Zapier, Make/Integromat) to connect cloud applications.

- Excellent troubleshooting skills for complex, multi-platform integration issues.

- Prior exposure to technology or data management within the commercial real estate or property sector is an advantage



What We Offer

- A collaborative and innovative environment where your technical expertise directly impacts business success in the dynamic commercial property space.

- Opportunities for professional development and training.

- We also offer a competitive remuneration package and the chance to be part of a thriving, high-performing organisation.

title: Accountant- NIGHT SHIFT
description:

Ledger Maintenance and Reconciliation. Verify information in an account to be accurate and complete in comparing the account balance to the individual transactions.

Financial Reporting: Prepare monthly financial reports with consistency and clarity for clients.

Accounts Payable Management: Prepare, track, process, and present accounts payable to clients on a daily or weekly basis based on clients needs. Ensure rapid response time for pertinent client payments.

1099 Preparation: Track tax information related to 1099 filings. Complete and submit 1099 forms on behalf of clients on time and in compliance.

Tax Support: Provide support during tax season and ensure compliance with applicable tax laws.

Analytical Skills: Ability to interpret financial data, identify trends and solve accounting related issues

Must-Have

People management experience

title: Interior Tile Designer (Bathrooms + Floors)  (Commercial, USA)
description:
We are developing a new community building in the USA and need a designer to create tile layouts and concepts for bathrooms, hallways, and selected floor areas. The design should be clean, simple, durable, and timeless. This is not a luxury or hotel-style project. The focus is on practical, buildable design that looks good and holds up under heavy use. Scope includes bathroom design (floor and wall tiling), hallway and common area flooring, and a small entrance/lobby feature if appropriate. There are also sink areas that may require simple commercial-style designs such as long stone or slab sinks. 



Requirements: Provide 2D tile layout plans that a contractor can follow, along with 3D renderings for visualization. Include tile sizes, layout patterns, and quantity estimates. No sourcing required. Materials should be suitable for commercial use (porcelain preferred). Design direction: Budget-conscious, not high-end. Bathrooms can be slightly warmer in tone. Main areas should be light, neutral, and minimal, with very limited accents. Avoid overly decorative or trendy designs. 



Technical: Must be realistic and buildable. Consider durability, maintenance, and slip resistance where relevant. Deliverables: Provide 2–3 different concept options. After selection, provide a final detailed layout with quantities. 



To apply: Send a relevant portfolio showing similar work (bathrooms, commercial, or simple functional spaces). Do not send only luxury or decorative projects. If possible, include a quick sample idea or reference direction. Confirm you can deliver 2D layouts, 3D renders, and quantities.

title: Tenant Services Representative
description:
We are a premier provider of executive and luxury furnished intermediate-term rentals in the Greater San Francisco Bay Area. We've spent decades delivering a hotel-quality “home away from home” for business professionals, relocating executives, and travelers from around the world. We manage fully furnished units across San Francisco and and are known for careful client screening, attentive service, and meticulously maintained properties.



We are looking for a warm, organized, and resourceful Tenant Services Representative to serve as the primary point of contact for inbound tenant and prospective tenant inquiries. In this role, you'll be the voice of our company — helping guests find their ideal rental, welcoming new tenants, and ensuring that every interaction reflects the high-touch, hospitality-first experience we're known for.



This is a relationship-centered role that requires both genuine people skills and strong attention to detail. You'll work closely with our leasing and operations teams to match prospective tenants with the right unit and to support current tenants throughout their stay.

, and platfor
ssages (Airbnb, Zillow, website, and others)

• Clearly explain lease terms, including our 1–9 month furnished rental model, and set accurate expectations for prospects seeking longer-term leases

• Answer questions about what's included in rent: furnishings, utilities (with caps), WiFi, housekeeping, laundry, cable, and local phone

• Walk prospective tenants through the move-in requirements: first month's rent, security deposit, and cleaning fees

Qualifications:

title: YouTube Growth Video Editor, Shorts Content Assistant & Lead Editor
description:
Job Title: YouTube Growth Partner & Systems Expert (OmaMoneyTips)



About the Brand:

OmaMoneyTips is a fast-growing financial education brand focused on property investment, wealth-building habits, and "Identity Shifts." We aren't just a YouTube channel; we are building a "Money Freedom Blueprint" to help people achieve peace and clarity with their finances.



I am looking for a dedicated **Full-Time Growth Partner** to be my right-hand operator. Your mission is to help me scale this channel to **100,000 subscribers** and hit major revenue milestones of **US$20,000 and $40,000 per month**.



Your Key Responsibilities:



1. **Retention-First Editing:** Use **Descript** to edit 3 weekly 10–15 min long-form videos. You must ensure "pattern interrupts" (zooms, text pops, B-roll) occur every **2–3 seconds** to maximize watch time.

2. **Shorts Multiplier:** Use **OpusClip** and **Descript** to repurpose long-form videos into 4–6 high-impact Shorts for YouTube, TikTok, IG, and FB. You must master the **0.5-second hook**.

3. **The Growth Tech Stack:** You will be the lead operator for:

    - **Descript:** For fast-cut editing and transcript-based workflows.

    - **OpusClip:** For AI-assisted short-form extraction and virality.

    - **VidIQ:** For keyword research and SEO metadata.

    - **Canva:** To design high-click-rate thumbnails.

    - **Buffer & ManyChat:** To manage multi-platform scheduling and lead automation.



What We Are Looking For:



- **Ownership Mindset:** You don't just "edit"; you think: *"How can I make this video reach 100k subs?"*

- **Systems Expert:** You love using AI tools (Descript, OpusClip) to work faster and smarter.

- **Speed:** You are comfortable with a 40-hour work week and fast turnarounds after our "Production Mondays."

- **Reliability:** You are looking for a long-term professional home.



The Success-Linked Compensation:



- **Base Salary:** $500 – $700 USD/month (Full-Time, 40hrs/week).

- **Subscriber Bonuses:** $50 USD bonus for every 10,000 subscriber milestone hit.

- **$20k Milestone Bonus:** A one-time **US$1,000 Cash Bonus** upon the channel achieving its first $20,000 revenue month.

- **$40k Milestone Bonus:** A one-time **US$2,000 Cash Bonus** upon the channel achieving its first $40,000 revenue month.



TO APPLY (Must follow exactly):



1. Start your application with the word **PROFIT**.

2. Include links to your best work (YouTube edits, Shorts, or Canva designs).

3. Include a **3–5 minute selfie video** telling me about your experience with **Descript/OpusClip** and how you will help us hit our growth goals.
