Pay:

- $3–$4 per hour  



Important:

You will receive all images and scripts from us.  

All work will be organized in a Google Drive folder.



This is very simple work. You will be trained and can learn everything in one day.



To apply:

- Tell us if you used CapCut before  

- Tell us if you have used Google Veo 3.1

- Send us a realistic video were someone is talking in a Podcast made by Google Veo 3.1 (optional)

title: Retail CAD Drafter (POSM & Store Fit-Out)
description:
Job Summary:

We are looking for a detail-oriented CAD Drafter with experience in a creative or agency environment to join our team. In this role, you will translate design concepts into precise technical drawings, bridging the gap between 3D visualizations and physical production. You will ensure that retail store layouts and POSM units are accurately documented and ready for fabrication and installation.



Key Responsibilities:



-Prepare accurate 2D floor plans, elevations, sections, and detailed construction drawings for full retail store layouts.

-Develop technical drawings for Point of Sale Materials (POSM), including exploded views, assembly drawings, and material specifications.

-Collaborate with 3D Visualizers and Interior Designers to ensure designs are structurally feasible and aligned with the original design intent.

-Maintain high standards in layering, scaling, dimensioning, and annotations to ensure clear communication with contractors and fabricators.

-Review drawings for accuracy, completeness, and buildability before submission or production.

-Update and revise drawings based on project feedback while meeting deadlines.



Requirements:



-Advanced proficiency in AutoCAD is required.

-Knowledge of SketchUp integration is an advantage.

-Proven experience in retail fit-outs and POSM production drawings.

-Familiarity with materials, fabrication methods, and manufacturing constraints used in retail environments.

-Experience working in a fast-paced creative or design agency is preferred.

-Strong attention to detail, communication skills, and teamwork, with a reliable and responsible work ethic.



Click this link to apply,

title: Customer Service Agent (Part-Time, Long-Term)
description:
1. FULL JOB DESCRIPTION



Customer Service Agent (Part-Time, Long-Term)



We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and reliable Customer Service Agent to join our growing eCommerce team.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to grow with the business and potentially move into a full-time role in the coming weeks.



You will be responsible for handling all customer communication and ensuring a smooth and professional experience for our customers.



This includes:



Responding to customer
s and messages



Handling complaints, disputes, and chargebacks



Providing clear, professional, and empathetic support



Managing order-related issues (tracking, delays, refunds, etc.)



Working with Shopify & Funnelish orders



Communicating solutions that protect the business



Identifying potential issues before they escalate



Following instructions and processes precisely



You must be able to think critically, stay calm under pressure, and always act in the best interest of the business.



Work Details:



$4/hour



2 hours/day



Monday to Saturday



Long-term role



Opportunity to become full-time soon based on performance



Potential for bonuses and pay increases



Requirements:



Experience in eCommerce Customer Service (REQUIRED)



Experience with Shopify & Funnelish orders (REQUIRED)



Excellent written English



Strong attention to detail



Empathetic but able to protect the business



Able to handle complaints and difficult customers professionally



Understands disputes, chargebacks, and how to reduce them



Can follow instructions strictly



Honest, responsible, and reliable



Patient and solution-oriented



Able to take feedback and improve quickly



Growth Opportunity:



We reward performance and loyalty.



If you consistently perform well, take ownership, and help reduce disputes and improve customer satisfaction, this role can quickly become full-time with increased pay and additional responsibilities.



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with the company.



2 - APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)



To make sure you read everything carefully:



Change the subject line of your application to:

"Customer Support Expert – I Protect the Business"



In the first line of your message, write:

"I pay attention to detail and care about customers!"



Also, please include:



Your experience with Shopify and Funnelish



A short example of how you handled a difficult customer or dispute



Your availability (hours per day)



Applications that do not follow these instructions will be automatically rejected.



We are not looking for someone who just replies to messages.



We are looking for someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and helps protect and grow the business.



If you are reliable, proactive, and want a long-term opportunity with growth potential, this role is for you.

title: URGENT HIRING: Virtual Assistant - Administrator, IT and Accounting Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting
description:
You only get one chance: carefully follow these instructions before applying or you will not hear from us. To apply you must visit our webpage 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/



Company: Health and Life



Location: Remote (with own internet and office facilities)



Job Type: Contract (may go long term depending on performance)



About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to the CEO and other consultants/managers.

Maintain accurate records, perform bookkeeping, and handle client billing.

Assist with financial reporting, budgeting, and petty cash management.

Manage calendars, appointments, and correspondence.

Develop and maintain effective working relationships with staff, clients, and suppliers.

Identify and resolve problems promptly, providing potential solutions.

Participate in special projects and additional duties as required.



Requirements:

Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting experience preferred.

Proven experience in administration, IT, and accounting.

Proficiency in using Google Suite, Xero, FileMaker Pro, and other software as specified.

Strong organisational and communication skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Commitment to maintaining confidentiality and adhering to ethical standards.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Working Conditions:

Standard 38-hour week, Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 5:00 pm ACDT.

Flexible working hours may be required.

Must have own internet and office facilities.

No leave entitlement applies

All tasks are allocated by a Google calendar. The more you complete competently and within budget, the more work you generate.



Fees:

Task-based monthly fees up to $3,000 AUD or equivalent overseas currency. Long term contract positions available based on performance.



Fees reviewed based on performance; potential for multiple fee increases for good performance.



How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for healthcare administration.



To apply visit our ”Undergraduate up to senior accountant jobs” web page 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/.



Attention to detail matters, so read the application process carefully. You only get one chance.
